NAME: ARCANE INVERSION
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Turns a potion into a poison or vice-versa. Roll against the Intensity Rank of the target potion. On a success, you can change the potion or poison to its opposite, e.g. +3 Focus to -3 Focus. For properties without clear opposites, work with the GM to come up with an appropriate choice.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose to increase or decrease the resulting potion or poison’s Intensity Rank by 1/degree.

NAME: BREWER’S WREATH
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Choose three potions when you cast this spell. On success, these potions are converted into small glowing orbs of colored light which float in a ring around your head. At any time, you can launch one of them at somebody, including yourself, which counts as taking the potion associated (1AP). The target must roll to Metabolize as usual. If you use it on somebody who is currently metabolizing, they will become ill and gain no benefits from the potion. It is also considered “rude.”
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target can take a +1/degree bonus to their Metabolize roll. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can also convert poisons.

NAME: IDENTIFYING LIGHT
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Casts a pale light on a potion that reflects its composition. On success, you can ask the GM a question about the potion. You can only use this on a given potion once.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You may ask 1/degree question(s) about the potion.

NAME: HARVESTER’S SIGHT
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: When you are in an area with natural materials, you can cast this spell to gain a wreath of small lavender lights in your irises. On success, you gain Harvester’s Sight, which will let you spend 10 minutes harvesting 50 materials from your surroundings. You can only use this spell once in any 24-hour period.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can spend up to 10/degree minutes harvesting 50 materials per 10 minutes spent.

NAME: WITHSTAND
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: An enchantment that imbues somebody with the resolve of a potion drinker. On a success, the target can add a +2 to their next Metabolize roll in the next hour. Excessive use can cause diarrhea, which nobody wants.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target can take a (2/3+) bonus to their Metabolize roll.

NAME: AUGMENT RECEPTIVITY
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: A sparkling golden enchantment that boosts someone’s receptivity to potions. On a success, the target can add 1 to a Stat or Ability bonus received from the next potion they take. For potions that don’t give a numerical bonus, the GM will rule a bonus that makes sense or decide that it cannot apply to the potion.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target adds (1/2/4/7/10) to the next potion bonus they receive. They can also take a +(0/0/1+) bonus to their Metabolize roll.

NAME: EXTRA STOMACH
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Cast this spell on someone who is currently metabolizing. On a success, the target can take a second potion, which will run its own Metabolize duration, at the end of which, the effect of the spell ends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target can take (1/1/2/2/2/3) extra potion(s), and takes a +(0/1/2/4+) bonus to the Metabolize roll on the new potion.

NAME: CATEYE
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell without rolling. Lights up your eyes with a golden, gleaming cat-eye effect for as long as you choose, during which time you can see if somebody is metabolizing a potion just by looking at them, as well as how much longer they have to metabolize it. You can choose to roll this spell to cast it subtly, hiding the cat-eye effect, but if you fail the roll, it is even more pronounced.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: GARLYTH’S PRIMEVAL HUNGER
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Your hunger for potions and their power is insatiable. On a success, you can metabolize up to 3 potions at once for the next 6 hours, and if anyone around you has potion benefits active, you gain them as well. Side effects may include eating everything you see. Garlyth takes no responsibility for it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can metabolize (3/3/4/4/5) extra potions, and take a +2/degree bonus to your Metabolize rolls for this time.

NAME: DECONSTRUCT
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Pours a brilliant lavender fluid-like magic from the tip of your wand into a potion, which breaks it down immediately. Roll against the Intensity Rank of the potion you use this on. On success, you break the potion down, destroying it and obtaining a number of materials equal to 50% of its materials cost.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain (50/60+)% of the base material cost.

NAME: SPECTRAL LAB
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a makeshift alchemy lab. On success, you can create an alchemy lab wherever you are that works for 500 materials. This lab can be dispelled and rematerialized at will from anywhere while it exists, although any potions passively brewing on it will pause brewing while it is dispelled, and nobody but you can interact with it. It disappears after 1 day, or once its material limit is exhausted. You can also make it look however you like, which is good if you’re really aesthetic.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The lab can be used for 500/degree materials, and lasts for 1/degree day(s).

NAME: DESTABILIZING COMPOUND
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: A magically-propelled stream of dissolved unstable alchemical compound. On success, a target must roll Endurance against your check or Resist Wound. The target takes a -4 penalty on each check if they are metabolizing a potion.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The penalty on a target metabolizing a potion is (-4/-5+).

NAME: ETERNAL HUNGER
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a dark miasma that drifts like a dense cloud, choking a target and seeping into their body. On success, a target must roll as if metabolizing a potion with a DC equal to your spell check. If they fail, they become afflicted with Eternal Hunger, a noxious malaise that eats at them from the inside out. If they go 24 hours without taking an Angel’s Balm potion, they must Resist, DC20. This condition lasts indefinitely. If you cast this on someone and they steal your Angel’s Balm potions, though, you don’t really get to complain.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: SONGWON’S ALCHEMY BURN
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Any time you are near a target, including yourself, who is metabolizing a potion, you can cast this potion by clapping your hands together with an incantation and summoning a green spectral flame between them that pours into a target’s body through their mouth and nose. On success, you can cause a willing target to Resist, DC14 in exchange for cutting their remaining metabolize time in half. A target cannot benefit from this ability again until they have finished metabolizing their current potion.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target can take a +1/degree bonus to their Resist check.

NAME: BREWSNAP
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell anytime you are brewing a potion, pouring a multicolored spectral flame out of your wand and into your brewing station. On success, you instantly finish 50 materials’ worth of brewing. You cannot use this spell on the same brewing process again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The spell instantly completes (50/100/150/200/300+) materials’ worth of brewing.

NAME: STONEBURN
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: Flares up a bright flash of lavender magic light that streaks out and hits a target who is benefitting from a potion, with a feeling universally described like getting hit with a rock. On success, a target must roll Agility or Endurance versus your spell check or have their active potion effect disabled for 5 minutes per degree of failure on their check. Ostensibly an offensive spell, there are enough alchemists dumb enough to drink everything put in front of them that this spell is commonly used to knock a poison out of the alchemist’s own system.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: SALMIAN’S SUMMON
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: If you have fewer potions than your potion limit, you can cast this spell to create a swirl of crackling lavender spectral flame around your fingers that flares up in a flash when you snap your fingers. On success, you can spend 150 materials to instantly obtain a 50-material potion. Potions obtained this way are said to taste better, but that might be Salmian’s marketing campaign.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can instantly obtain any potion up to 50/degree materials by paying 3 times the material cost.

NAME: TRUNDALE’S TORMENT
SUBJECT: ALCHEMY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell over 30 minutes to create a single droplet of blood-red liquid. On success, you create a droplet of magic liquid that will become undetectable if placed into any liquid and lasts indefinitely. If someone consumes this droplet, they must roll Endurance versus your spell check or be afflicted with Trundale’s Torment. When a target afflicted with Trundale’s Torment takes a potion, if they fail or roll a critical failure on the Metabolize roll, the potion is instead turned into a poison with the opposite effect, as in the spell Arcane Inversion. This effect lasts indefinitely, and it does not turn a poison into a potion, which is just rude at that point. Like, it could at least do that much.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The spell takes (30 minutes/10 minutes/1 minute/no time) to cast, and creates 1/degree droplet(s).

NAME: TITANS’ COMPASS
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on an artifact without rolling for it. Once you have, you can roll for this spell at any time to obtain a clue about the artifact’s location. You cannot use this spell to find the same artifact until you’ve found it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can gain 1/degree clue(s) about the artifact’s location.

NAME: CRYSTAL OF POWER
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Implants a deep red spectral crystal into an artifact. On a success, you can increase the power of one effect on the target artifact for 1 minute. Work with the GM to determine what the power increase looks like. The crystal can cause chafing, so don’t use it on your artifact underwear.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (1 minute/1 hour/8 hours/1 day) and gives +(0/1/2/4+) to backfire checks made with that artifact.

NAME: FORGE’S WHISPER
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: A trail of glowing red threads link you to a target artifact, forming a telepathic link. On success, you tap into the spiritual essence of the artifact and can ask it any question it would know the answer to. If it doesn’t know the answer, the GM will allow you to choose a different question. Please be warned that artifacts see some weird stuff.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s) of the artifact. On 3 or more degrees of success, the artifact’s knowledge extends to any knowledge anybody has had while attuned to it in the past.

NAME: DIAMOND INSIGHT
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Touch an artifact as part of casting this spell. On success, you can determine one of the following: • What does this artifact do? • How difficult is it to attune to? • Who, if anyone, is it attuned to? • How old is it? • Who made it? • At the GM’s discretion, you can ask any similar question in this vein. The artifact reserves the right to judge you if you ask an invasive question, though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree questions. The GM will give you (0/0/1+) extra pieces of information relevant to your goals from glimpsing the artifact’s psyche.

NAME: ARTIFACT’S RESERVE
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Pulls a wave of strength out of an artifact in a brilliant red light that bursts out from your hand when you do. Touch an artifact you are attuned to as part of casting this spell. On a success, you can choose one bonus: • +2 to a Stat • +4 to an Ability • Ignore the next Condition you would take • +6 to your next check • This ability lasts for 30 minutes, and the artifact becomes inert and loses all its abilities for 8 hours once the effect ends, and you cannot cast this spell on it again until then.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take 1/degree bonus(es). You cannot take the same bonus multiple times unless you’ve already taken all four. The artifact lies inert for (8 hours/4 hours/2 hours/1 hour/30 minutes/10 minutes/1 minute/no time) after the effect ends.

NAME: TIMELESS LEGACY
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Reach deep into the spirit of an artifact you are attuned to and feel the depth of its history. You can summon a spectral copy of one person the artifact was previously attuned to, who will have the same personality and knowledge that the person did when they were last attuned to the artifact, who stays for 10 minutes or until dispelled. They can answer any questions you have, but they won’t necessarily like you or have any reason to answer your questions. If you just want to force someone to listen to you talk about your latest niche interest, though, have at it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can summon 1/degree previous owner(s), and force at least one to answer (0/1+) questions strictly truthfully. On 3 or more degrees of success, the summoned copy has all knowledge that they have now or that they did when they were last alive.

NAME: SHATTER BOND
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: A violent rippling red wave of magic flows down your arm and out your hand. Touch an artifact as part of casting this spell. On a success, you can force the artifact to lose any attunement it currently has. If the person attuned to the artifact is in physical contact with it, they can roll Willpower against your check to resist the effect. You can use it on your own artifact, but you could also just end the attunement normally. But why would you want to be an artificer if you’re not dramatic?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can treat the target artifact as being attuned to you for (0 time/30 seconds/5 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: SPECTRAL COPY
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Touch an artifact as part of casting this spell. On a success, a deep red magic flows from your wand and creates a Spectral Copy, a spectral version of the artifact that is automatically attuned to you and works just like the original artifact. It is solid for you, but is incorporeal for everyone else. This Spectral Copy lasts for 30 minutes, after which it explodes violently and kills you. I’m kidding. It just disappears with a little pop.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Spectral Copy lasts for 30/degree minutes. You have a (0,1+) bonus on checks with it.

NAME: FORGE OF THE ETERNAL LEGION
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: The constructs of this world are all waiting for you to lead them. On a success, a spectral cloak made of red magic billows out behind you, and spectral red gauntlets form over your hands. For the next 10 minutes, all artifacts nearby obey your telepathic command. Treat all artifacts close to you as being attuned to you instead, granting a +1 to the associated Subject for the duration, and you can control them all as if they are extensions of your body. When this spell ends, a peal of red light flares out from you, and you can choose to force any artifacts that became temporarily attuned to you to lose their attunement to their original holders.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You take a +1/degree bonus to the associated Subject for each artifact connected to you. At the end of the effect, you can keep (0,1+) of the attunements to Advanced or lower artifacts.

NAME: POWER CHANNEL
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Draws a long, blazing-red magic thread out of an artifact, which wraps around your hand, glowing furiously red. Grants one Power Channel connected to the field of magic associated with the artifact you took it from, which you can spend to take a +4 in the casting of one spell in that field. Power Channels last indefinitely, but you cannot cast this spell again until you have used any you have.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take 1/degree Power Channel(s), which grant a +(4/5+) bonus. You can only use one at a time.

NAME: SEIZE CONTROL
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Swirling red magic surrounds your hand, giving you an indomitable force of artificy will. Touch an artifact you are not attuned to as part of casting this spell. On success, you gain a temporary attunement to it for 1 use in the next 10 minutes. Once you have used this spell, you cannot attune to that artifact, by this spell or normally, for a week. It also might give you a nasty look.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can use the artifact (1/2/4/unlimited) time(s) in the next (10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours). You can take a +(0/0/2/5+) bonus to checks to use it. You cannot attune to the artifact again for (1 week/1 week/3 days/2 days/24 hours).

NAME: UNBREAKABLE IRON LEGACY
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Legacy connects you to the great construct masters before you. On success, you summon the Leviathan, a spectral construct in the shape of a suit of clockwork powered armor, around you. For the next 5 minutes, take a +6 to all stats, and a further +6 to Body. The Leviathan allows you to fly at high speeds, and you can break almost any physical object without having to roll for it. You and anyone you are holding with the Leviathan cannot be Downed by dropping below 1 Resolve. At the end of the spell, the Leviathan dissolves in a cloud of red magic dust, and anyone who was being kept sustained at 0 Resolve becomes Downed. Please keep in mind the Leviathan was created by forges a thousand years ago, and so it might be a bit unstylish today.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +(6/9+) bonus to all stats and again to Body. The effect lasts for (5 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours). At 4 or more degrees of success, you are immune to all Conditions while the effect is active.

NAME: IRON GLOVE
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering veil of brilliant red magic over one hand, patching in the gaps of a damaged artifact you touch with that hand. On success, you can use a damaged artifact once with no penalty, or a broken artifact once with the same penalty as a damaged one, at any point in the next 1 minute. This is not giving you free license to break artifacts.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can use the artifact (1/2/4/unlimited) time(s) in the next (1 minute/10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours). On 4 or more degrees of success, you can use a broken artifact without penalty.

NAME: ARGON’S RING OF FORCE
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: A glowing band of red magic that forms as a bangle around your wrists, linking up to your artifacts. Choose one artifact you are attuned to and receive Force Ring on those artifacts for 5 minutes. While Force Ring is active on an artifact, you can take a +1 bonus to your rolls to use that artifact, including on artifact backfires. It also looks pretty cool, honestly, which to a lot of artificers is the most important part.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +(1/2/3/4/7+) bonus to rolls to use the artifact.

NAME: SOULBURN
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: A thin tendril of red magic connects from your heart to an artifact. You can cast this spell on an artifact without rolling, becoming Soulburned to it. Whenever you backfire with an artifact you are Soulburned to, you can choose to Resist instead. Once you are Soulburned to an artifact, you cannot remove it except by unattuning to the artifact, at which point you must Resist Loss, DC11.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: LEGEND CALL
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: If you are attuned to an artifact that is not on your person, you can cast this spell to summon a column of spectral red flame from the palm of your hand. On success, that artifact is summoned instantly to your hand, no matter the distance. If there is any antimagic between you and your artifact, this spell fails, and you must Resist, DC7. Looks really cool, but if you have a silly-looking artifact, it kind of spoils the effect.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +1/degree bonus to a check to use the artifact immediately after obtaining it. On 5 or more degrees of success, you can summon your artifact safely through antimagic, which causes it to arrive with an explosive shockwave.

NAME: AELYN’S PRETTY POCKET
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a glittery pocket of pink magic that you can hide an artifact inside, regardless of its size. The pocket disappears after the artifact is placed inside, leaving a thin silvery string that can be pulled on to retrieve the artifact. This string can only be found by someone searching you with a Search roll, DC12. You can cast this spell without rolling, or you can choose to roll it, in which case the Search DC required to find the string equals your spell check + 4, but if you backfire on the roll, the string instead disappears for an hour, which makes it impossible to find the artifact but also impossible to retrieve it until the hour is up. A useful spell that is nonetheless unpopular with artificers because the pocket is, honestly, a little tacky. Not Aelyn’s most tasteful work.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: MASTER OF FORCE
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Sheathes an artifact in brilliant spectral red flame. On success, you can give the Empowered status for 15 minutes to one artifact you are attuned to. Any time an Empowered artifact forces somebody other than yourself to roll to resist its effect, they take a -2 penalty. Ideal for absolutely obliterating the guy in your class who keeps checking you out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can give (1/2/4+) stack(s) of Empowered, including to the same artifact multiple times, multiplying the -2 penalty.

NAME: GLIMMERLINK
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Cast this spell on an artifact you are not attuned to. On success, you create a shimmering link of spectral crystal between you and the artifact, making it more amenable to attunement. The next time within 15 minutes that you attempt to attune to the artifact, take a +2 to the attunement check.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +2/degree bonus to the attunement check.

NAME: GHOST ARSENAL
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a brilliant flash of crimson magic that clamps down around an artifact and creates a spectral copy of it. On success, you can create one copy of an artifact you are attuned to. The spectral copy acts just like the original artifact, except it is attuned to somebody of your choice other than yourself when you cast this spell, and it disappears upon backfiring or after 10 minutes. If you attempt to create a spectral copy attuned to somebody who already has maximum attunements, they can choose to unattune from another artifact or for the effect to fail. Be warned that sometimes the duplicate looks cooler than your own, and then you get jealous.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can create 1/degree Spectral Copy(ies), which can be the same one multiple times.

NAME: TITAN’S WILL
SUBJECT: ARTIFICY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a set of spectral brass plates that cover your arms and hands. On success, you automatically succeed on your next artifact backfire roll. This effect lasts for one hour, even if you’ve spent it, and you cannot cast it again until it runs out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You automatically succeed on the next 1/degree artifact backfire(s).

NAME: DUPLICATE
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: A pale violet magic covers an enchanted object, its surface shifting as it interprets the enchantment. On success, you can create a temporary copy of the enchantment on a different object that remains for 1 hour. Copies are said to “just not have the same je ne sais quoi,” though, so you have been warned.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The copy lasts for (1 hour/8 hours/24 hours/3 days/1 week). You can duplicate the enchantment onto 1/degree object(s).

NAME: VALEY’S LOCK
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell to lock or unlock a seal. On a success, you either lock the opening in a way that requires an opening check to beat your spell check, or you open a lock if you beat its associated DC. The spell makes a loud noise on unlocking.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The unlocking noise is (loud/moderate/quiet/silent).

NAME: DISPEL ENCHANTMENT
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Releases needle-like tendrils of pale violet magic that pierce through an enchanted object, removing one enchantment of your choice from it. Someone worked really hard on that enchantment, though, you know. I hope you’re happy.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Removes 1/degree enchantment(s). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can choose to instead transfer any number of removed enchantments onto a different object.

NAME: ALHEIM’S ENCHANTER BELL
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Summons a small silvery bell that rings softly in different ways in response to the fine details of an enchantment. On success, you can ask one of the following questions about one enchanted object you can see: • Who made this enchantment? • When was this enchantment made? • What does this enchantment do? • How can this enchantment be broken? • Where is the person who made this enchantment? • Once you have used this spell, you cannot use it again on the same object.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s) about an enchantment on the target object.

NAME: MINDWEAVER
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Insidious pale violet threads weave from the tip of your wand and mesh over a person’s head, flooding them with magic. On success, the target must roll Recall Information versus your spell check or have their mind be rewritten to suit your tastes. For each degree of failure on their check, you can remove, change, or add one thing to their memories. As per the Magic Council Ordinance of last year, the High Court officially declared this spell as a “dick move.”
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: ENCHANTER’S CLOAK
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Summons a pale violet cloak that settles over an enchanted object. On success, the object’s enchantment is hidden and it appears to be a mundane object for 10 minutes. Anyone investigating it must roll Analyze versus your spell check + 5 to tell that you’ve hidden an enchantment, although they can’t make out any details about the enchantment other than that this spell is hiding its characteristics.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can hide the enchantment for (10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours/indefinitely).

NAME: REPAIR ENCHANTMENT
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Summons two orbs of shimmering pale violet light that set to work repairing a damaged enchanted object. On a success, you can repair one enchanted object, no matter how damaged it is, so long as you have more than half of the original object. Once the spell is cast, it works for 1 hour before it completes the repair. The little magic orbs look really proud of themselves once they’re done. Don’t forget to tell them they did a good job, okay?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can repair 1/degree enchanted object(s). The spell takes (1 hour/30 minutes/10 minutes/1 minute/no time) to complete.

NAME: STEAL ENCHANTMENT
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Creates a spectral hand that glows pale violet and attempts to snatch the magic off of an enchantment. On success, you gain one-use access to a spell connected to the enchantment placed on an object, which you can also use to place the same enchantment on an object.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +(0/1/3+) bonus to either cast the spell or place it as an enchantment.

NAME: MARK OF LIFE
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Creates an enchantment mark on an object that gives it some limited capacity of life. On success, the object is animated for 1 minute. It has some limited knowledge of its surroundings and any time it has been used, and it can move freely through space. You can end the effect instantly at any point. Based on the object, the GM may decide it has some limited capacities of speech or other abilities. Thankfully, enchanted objects don’t typically start dancing and singing.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The object is animated for (1 minute/10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours), and is (neutral/cooperative/friendly) to you. It takes a +(0/1+) bonus to any Strong rolls it makes.

NAME: GREATER AWAKENING
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Breathes a whisper of life into an object. On success, the target object becomes animated as if enchanted with Mark of Life, but the animation is permanent. Please be warned that you can’t shut it off once you’ve done this, so really make sure you want your cutlery flying around.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target object takes a + 2/degree bonus to Strong checks.

NAME: MASS AWAKENING
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Summons a shower of glowing pale violet lights that sparkle like stars above you before plunging into several objects at once. On success, you can animate 2 objects as if enchanted with Mark of Life for 1 minute. The animated objects will be friendly towards you and want to help you, but they don’t always have the best idea how to be helpful.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can animate (2/4*) objects for (1 minute/10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: THE ENCHANTER’S ENDLESS ARCHIVES
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: All enchanting legacies lead to you, and the accumulated enchanting wisdom of ages is at your fingertips. On a success, everything you are wearing becomes enchanted with a levitation charm, glowing and allowing you to move freely through space, and the Enchanter’s Tome appears in front of you, a spectral book that somehow never runs out of pages. While the Tome is active, you can flip through it to any enchantment in the book and place it instantly on any object (1AP). You can pick any Advanced or lower spell to enchant an object with, whether you know that spell or not, and you can choose whether to roll for it or to have it last for 24 hours. In addition, while you are in this state, no spell can directly affect you. Any spell targeted at you directly will be absorbed, granting you one-use access to that spell for a future enchantment. This state lasts for 5 minutes, during which time placing enchantments costs only 50 materials. Please make sure you are on the ground again once the spell ends. It can make an embarrassing end to an otherwise cool spell.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (5 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour), during which time placing enchantments costs (50/10/0) materials. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can place any hex as an enchantment as well.

NAME: BLOOD ENCHANTMENT
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a willing target, including yourself. Violet light pours into the target’s body, where they can feel it coursing inside them. On success, the target can have enchantments placed on them like a physical object for 10 minutes. Once the effect ends, the target must Resist, DC14.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours). The target takes a + 1/degree bonus to the Resist roll.

NAME: VALEY’S LITTLE MARK
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: When you roll to enchant an object, you can cast this spell. On success, instead of being enchanted, the object gains a tiny mark that’s hard to spot, and after an amount of time you choose up to 10 minutes, the enchantment takes effect. Anyone looking to spot the Little Mark must roll Search versus your spell check + 5. If they spot it, not only will they be able to determine what type of enchantment is going to take place and when, but also it’s going to make the Little Mark uncomfortable, because it’s very shy.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose an amount of time up to (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours/1 week/1 month/1 year). On 5 or more degrees of success, you can also choose activation criteria for the Little Mark to take effect.

NAME: RASCAL’S HAND
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Creates an invisible magic force that tethers you from afar to an object, allowing you to enchant it from a distance. There must be an opening, no matter how small, between you and the target object, but if there is, you can roll versus a DC equal to twice the number of meters between you and the target. On a success, you can enchant the target object as if you are touching it. On a failure, you cannot use this spell again on that object for an hour.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: ALHEIM’S MAGIC RING
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Converts a batch of magic materials into a swirl of magic energy that flows like a ring of pulsating magic water around your wrist, pouring its magic out into enchantments. To cast this spell, spend 500 materials and roll. On success, you obtain a Magic Ring for 10 minutes, during which time placing enchantments does not cost materials and you can take a +1 bonus to checks to place enchantments. If you ever find an enchanted object and you can’t figure out why someone bothered enchanting it, odds are it was an enchanter with ten seconds left on this spell who wanted to get their materials’ worth out of it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +1/degree bonus to checks to place enchantments while the effect is active.

NAME: ENCHANTING COMMAND
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on an object enchanted by someone other than you, emitting a single bright flash of rainbow light towards the target object. Roll DC16 or against the check used to create the enchantment, at the GM’s discretion. On success, you can give one short, simple command to the enchanted object, which it will follow over any other directions it has received.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can give 1/degree command(s), which can be to the same object or multiple.

NAME: HEAD OF THE HOUSEHOLD
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell if at least one object exists somewhere with an active enchantment you have placed. On success, you instantly learn the location and status of any one object of your choice that you have an enchantment on, perceiving its surroundings as if you were at its location for a moment. Good if you have a lot of enchanted objects at home and you want to make sure they’re not getting up to too much mischief, singing and dancing.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can learn the location and perceive the surroundings of 1/degree object(s) you have enchanted. If you must make a Perception roll to fully perceive the target’s surroundings, take a +1/degree bonus.

NAME: ETERNAL LEARNER
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Lights up a glow from the tip of your wand that picks up magic from an enchanted object, storing a sample of it for study. Roll DC10/DC15/DC20/DC30/DC30 depending on if the object is enchanted with a Basic/Standard/Advanced/Legendary/Hex spell. On success, you obtain the spell-learning materials for the associated spell, and you can take a +1 to checks to learn that spell. Once you have obtained the spell-learning materials for a spell this way, you cannot cast this spell on the same enchantment again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a + 1/degree bonus to checks to learn the spell.

NAME: VALEY’S MAGIC SWITCH
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering matrix of magic light in front of you that you can manipulate with your hand to sabotage an enchanted object. Roll DC14 or against the DC used to create the target object’s enchantment, at the GM’s discretion. On success, the target object loses its enchantment for an amount of time you choose up to 5 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target loses its enchantment for an amount of time you choose up to (5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: ENCHANTED EYES
SUBJECT: ENCHANTMENT
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell anytime you can see an object you have an enchantment on, or if you can sense its presence through an effect like Head of the Household. On success, you can take direct psychic control of the enchanted object, perceiving the world around it as if you are at its location, and moving it as an extension of yourself. You can stay in this state as long as you like, but during this time, you are oblivious to anything happening to your own body. You can switch your consciousness back to your own body at any point, but this ends the effect. If an object loses its enchantment while you are controlling it, the effect ends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can control 1/degree object(s) you have an enchantment on. You can switch freely between any objects you are controlling this way, but you can only control one at a time.

NAME: VASHNAR’S MILKWEED
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Creates an enchanted plant that grows wildly and ferociously, ensnaring people in its path. On success, you can choose one person nearby to be ensnared in the tangling weed growth that bursts out, capturing them until they succeed on an Athletics or Agility check versus your spell check (1AP). The weed field grows to about two meters tall in a ten-square-meter area and stays there for half an hour before it disappears.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can choose to have the weeds grow thorned and thrashing, forcing anybody who breaks out of them to Resist.

NAME: LANGUAGE OF THE EARTH
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Connects your magic with that of a plant, allowing you to communicate with it. On success, you can communicate with one plant of your choice for 5 minutes. Nonmagical plants have limited understanding and thus can only communicate simple ideas and knowledge, but magical plants may have more intelligence. That said, if you want a proper conversation, I don’t know, maybe try a human being?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can communicate with the plant for up to (5 minutes/20 minutes/1 hour). The plant will be (suspicious/neutral/cooperative/friendly) with you. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can allow anyone with you to also communicate with and understand the plant.

NAME: LOCATE ROOTS
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: If you can touch solid earth, you can cast this spell. Name a plant when you cast this spell, and on success, the GM will give you a clue about where you can find that plant. If that plant isn’t growing in any patch of earth connected to the earth you touch when casting this spell, the GM will tell you so, and the spell cannot find anything. You can only use this spell once per specific plant you’re searching for.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You receive 1/degree clue(s) about the plant’s location, or on 4 degrees of success, you can instantly locate the plant, as long as it is nonmagical. At the GM’s discretion, you may be able to locate a magical plant whose Intensity Rank your spell check beats in this way.

NAME: BARKFLESH
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Imbues you with a shimmering coating of spectral dark wood for 10 minutes. While active, the effect prevents you from taking Wound, except via spell backfires. The first time you would take Wound, the spell is shattered with a loud cracking sound, and it is dispelled. An effect that would inflict multiple stacks of Wound does not inflict any.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (10 minutes/20 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours), and protects you (1/1/1/2/2/3) time(s) before disappearing. While active, you take a (0/1+) bonus to Endurance checks.

NAME: NATURAL IMMUNITY
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: The spell courses through your body, protecting you from toxins. When you cast this spell, you are immune to all poison-related effects for the next 5 minutes. Once you have used this spell, you cannot use it again for the next hour, as the spell finishes working its way out of your body. It doesn’t protect you against your toxic ex. Don’t text her.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: CLOUD OF SPORES
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Summons a cloud of fluorescent green spores that drift until they find solid ground. Anyone nearby must roll Agility versus your check or get caught in the spore cloud and be immobilized in the magic fungus that sprouts from it for 30 seconds. You can end the effect early by commanding the spores to burst, at which point anyone nearby must Resist.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect fills an area up to (1/2*) meters wide, and you can choose 1/degree target(s) beyond yourself to be immune to the effect. Targets who fail are immobilized for (30 seconds/1 minute/2 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes).

NAME: NEPHERA’S PURPLE HAZE
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Summons a thick purple haze that billows out from your wand and fills the space. Anyone close by must make an Endurance check versus your spell check - 4 or become drowsy and inebriated, taking a -4 to all checks for 1 minute. Nephera invented this as an insomnia cure, but it turns out the sleep quality is terrible, so she turned it against her detractors instead.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Affects targets up to (1/2/5/10) meter(s) away. Targets who fail their check take a -(4/5/6) penalty for (1/2/5) minute(s). On 4 or more degrees of success, targets who fail the check fall asleep for 5 minutes instead.

NAME: HEAVEN’S TEARDROP
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Draws together a swirl of magic energy from the nature around to create a single droplet of distilled magic purity. You cannot use this spell if there is no nature around you, but a single leaf or square of packed earth will suffice. On success, you create one Heaven’s Teardrop, a colored droplet that glows with magical energy. It can be stored in a sealed container for up to 10 minutes, but after that it turns into water. Drinking a Heaven’s Teardrop removes one non-Wound condition. It will also quench your thirst by a very, very, very small amount.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create 1/degree Heaven’s Teardrop(s).

NAME: PHEROMONE ATTRACTION
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Releases a magic wave that converts loose pheromones in the air into a specific type. On success, you can attract or repel one type of creature for 10 minutes. It technically works on humans, but you probably don’t want to put human-repelling pheromones on yourself. You’ll rip your own skin off.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose 1/degree type(s) of creature to attract or repel. On 3 or more degrees of success, affected creatures must roll Willpower against your check any time they try to resist the effects, and attracted creatures start out friendly to you.

NAME: WALL OF THORNS
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: The earth bends to your command, and thorns are an extension of yourself. On success, you can create up to 10 meters of a wall of brambles in a straight line. This wall will act as a sentry and alert you psychically when a creature approaches it, and anyone attempting to get through must roll Agility or Endurance versus your spell check, rolling Resist Wounds on failure. If the thorns inflict Wound on someone or if someone destroys the thorns, you also know who it is. You must have access to arable land to cast this spell, even if the soil is of poor quality.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can create 10/degree meters of wall. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can shape the wall as you like, but it cannot form a sealed container. On 4 or more degrees of success, you can make the wall look like harmless plants until it activates.

NAME: MASTER OF ROOTS
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Pours a brilliant emerald magic light from the tip of your wand that flows like a fluid into the roots of plants around you. On success, 4 nonmagical plants that you can see gain Ferocity of the Woods. A plant with Ferocity of the Woods can move and act, although slowly, and will try to help you. The GM will decide for each plant if it has 2, 3, or 4 Resolve, and if it rolls 3/6, 5/10, or 2/8. The effect lasts for 10 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can animate 4/degree plants, and they take a +(0/1) bonus to their Strong roll. The plants remain animated for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/24 hours/as long as you like). On 3 or more degrees of success, the plants can communicate. On 5 or more degrees of success, you can animate magical plants.

NAME: NATURAL BLESSING
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Floods the space around you with enriching magic. On success, nonmagical plants around you suddenly and wildly grow, whether from a seed to a full plant or from a full plant into something overgrown. Finally, you can stop killing your succulents. I mean, you can still overgrow them and kill them that way, so maybe I’m speaking too soon.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can accelerate the growth of plants within (1/2*) meter(s). On 5 or more degrees of success, the spell works on magical plants as well.

NAME: VINELASH
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Fires a brilliant bolt of crackling emerald-green energy that ensnares a plant, breaking it down. On success, you can instantly harvest a magic plant worth up to 500 materials from a distance. It can also destroy a regular plant, if you just hate ferns or something, I don’t know.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can harvest a plant worth up to 500/degree materials.

NAME: ENCHANTED EARTH
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering sphere of magic light at the tip of your wand that bursts into small crystalline particulates, settling into the ground. Choose a magical plant you want to cultivate and roll against its Intensity Rank. On success, you can cultivate the plant in the target location, regardless of the type of terrain. When cultivated this way, you can feel anything the plant feels no matter the distance, as long as you are on the same plane. If the plant has some sense of perception beyond just feeling when it is touched, you can perceive that as well.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: TOUCH OF GROWTH
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Pours a thick fluid-like magic light from the tip of your wand into a magic plant to grow a second cultivar from it. You can roll versus the Intensity Rank of a magic plant in your cultivation, and on success, you can create a duplicate of it in your cultivation by spending a number of materials equal to its Material Cost. The duplicated plant is inert for the first 24 hours, during which time you cannot use this spell again, but after that it behaves exactly like the first.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The material cost is reduced by (0/100+) materials, to a minimum of 50.

NAME: VASHNAR’S SECRET SIGN
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Creates a glimmering spectral sigil at the tip of your wand that guides you towards a magic plant. On success, you can get a clue about the location of the nearest magic plant and how to get to it or to find out what the closest magic plant is. You cannot use this spell again until you’ve found the plant it pointed you towards, or until 24 hours have passed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain 1/degree clue(s) about the plant’s location, or on 5 or more degrees of success, you learn its location instantly. Any further degrees of success give you information about the path to that plant or its surroundings.

NAME: SPARKESGUARD
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: A glimmer of magic that flares up in response to danger from a magic plant. You can roll this spell in place of any other checks to resist an effect from a magic plant or from an Herbalism spell. Renowned herbalist Alessandra Sparkes is well known for her protective magics such as this one, but she prefers to spend her time gossiping. We can’t blame her. There’s always interesting gossip around Starfall.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: LEAFBURN
SUBJECT: HERBALISM
DESCRIPTION: Creates a flicker of emerald-green magic that flares up and consumes a magic plant. You can cast this spell without rolling, sacrificing a magic plant worth up to 150 materials, taking a +5 to your next spell check for each 50 materials’ worth of plant sacrificed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: GLYPH
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Place an enchanted runic glyph on a surface that stores the power of a single spell. Choose a spell you know as part of casting this spell, and roll that spell. On a success, instead of being cast, your spell is stored into a glyph on the surface in front of you, along with any activation criteria you set when you cast this spell. The glyph lasts for 1 day and goes off when its activation criteria are met, disappearing afterwards. Anyone who can see the rune can roll Analyze versus your spell check to identify the spell stored in it, to identify the activation criteria on two degrees of success, and to identify the caster on three degrees of success.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: CHANNEL RUNE
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Pulls the power out of a rune made by you or by someone who consents with a flash of burgundy magic energy. Touch a rune as part of casting this spell. On a success, the rune becomes deactivated and glows as a magic mark on you instead, and whatever effects the rune had are applied directly to you instead for 10 minutes, after which it returns to its original surface. You cannot use this spell again until it runs out, but you can end the effect early if you choose. Keep in mind that some runes look better on a sword than they do on your butt, though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The rune lasts for (10 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). You can channel (1/1/2+) runes this way.

NAME: SYMBOL OF POWER
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target takes a +1 to a Subject chosen when you cast this spell. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus.

NAME: SYMBOL OF PROTECTION
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target can take a +1 to a Resist ability chosen when you use this spell. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus.

NAME: SYMBOL OF SWIFTNESS
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target can move with increased speed, which also reduces the AP cost of movement by 1 (minimum 1) and gives a bonus of 2AP at the start of Action. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +(2/2/2/2/3/4/5/6) to their AP at the start of Action, and moves (1.1/1.2/1.5/2/3/4+)x faster.

NAME: SYMBOL OF FORESIGHT
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target gains one point of Foresight. They can spend their point of Foresight at any time to gain a single insight from the GM about the situation. The Runic Blessing remains active on them even if they use all of their Foresight. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes 1/degree point(s) of Foresight.

NAME: SYMBOL OF FORTUNE
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target gains one point of Fortune. They can use one point of Fortune at any point to reroll a check other than Resist. The Runic Blessing remains active on them even if they use all of their Fortune. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes 1/degree point(s) of Fortune.

NAME: SYMBOL OF CHARISMA
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target can take a +1 to Charm checks when you use this spell. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus.

NAME: COMPREHEND RUNE
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: A deep glowing burgundy magic flows from the tip of your wand and floods through the shape of a rune. Roll against a DC set by the GM based on the rune, or against the check that was used to create the rune. On success, you can ask one question: • What does the rune do? • What makes the rune activate or deactivate? • Who made the rune? • When was the rune made?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s), and learn (0/0/0/0/1+) new glyph(s) present in the rune.

NAME: RUNIC SHATTER
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a glowing spectral sword made of countless tiny runes that plunges into a rune. On a success, you plunge the magic blade into a target rune, shattering it. If your spell check was higher than the check to create the rune, you can choose to destroy the rune instantly. If not, then the rune is disabled for 10 minutes. Great job ruining it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: If the rune is not destroyed, it is disabled for up to (10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: ANTI-RUNIC ASCENSION
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a coat of spectral armor made of countless tiny runes that surrounds your body. On success, you can ignore the effect of all runes for 10 minutes. You can choose to intentionally let any rune’s effect through the barrier. The main downside is that the armor looks pretty frumpy and isn’t very flattering unless you’re, like, a supermodel.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can shield (0/1+) other willing target(s) with the effect. The effect lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: PRODIGY OF THE ANCIENT RUNIC LORDS
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: The boundary between you and the runes fused with your body has long been lost. Touch a rune as part of casting this spell. On a success, you transfer the rune onto your own body, as small or as large as you want it, wherever you want it. The rune’s effect now applies directly to you, and if your check is higher than the check to create the rune, you can choose to destroy the original rune in the process. The rune is permanent, and you can activate or deactivate it at will. Please be aware that any tatted-up runologists might actually be avatars of destruction, which is a little scarier than a wannabe-badass on a Harley.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can transfer 1/degree rune(s) to your body.

NAME: SYMBOL OF THE ARCANE
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target gains a +2 bonus to one spell chosen when you cast this spell. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +2/degree bonus.

NAME: SYMBOL OF INSIGHT
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target always knows when someone is knowingly lying. This ability does not detect more obfuscated forms of deception, just alerts the target when someone makes a statement they know to be untrue, which technically also alerts you to sarcasm and gets a little annoying. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: On 4 or more degrees of success, the target can determine when somebody is hiding something beyond just lying outright, and can take a +(0/0/0/2/3+) bonus to Read Person checks to tell what they’re hiding.

NAME: SYMBOL OF CONTEMPLATION
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next 8 hours, the target takes a +2 to any rolls to perform a Downtime activity. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +2/degree bonus.

NAME: SYMBOL OF THE BLACK CAT
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target becomes invisible while standing perfectly still in the shadow, and takes a +1 to Stealth checks. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus on Stealth checks. On 4 or more degrees of success, the target can move slowly in shadow while remaining invisible.

NAME: SYMBOL OF THE EARTH
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target always knows the way to the closest magic plant and to the closest ley line outcropping, and takes a +1 bonus to any checks to interact with magic plants. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus to checks to interact with magic plants.

NAME: SYMBOL OF GREATER SIGHT
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target can see farther in greater detail, allowing objects to be seen as if they are half the distance away, granting a +1 to Perception checks, and if the target concentrates on a surface less than 6 inches thick for 5 seconds, they can see through the surface. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus on Perception checks.

NAME: SYMBOL OF HERMES
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target gains 1 point of Hermes’ Gift. The target can use points of Hermes’ Gift to cast Flight, taking 1 degree of success for each point of Hermes’ Gift expended. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree point(s) of Hermes’ Gift.

NAME: SYMBOL OF ROYALTY
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target takes a +1 per degree of success to Charm checks against draconic creatures and on any checks forced by draconic creatures. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus.

NAME: SYMBOL OF THE ARTIFICER
SUBJECT: RUNOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person and cast forth a Runic Blessing, a simple runic mark that glows on their skin. For the next hour, the target has a +1 per degree of success to attunement rolls and artifact rolls, including backfire rolls. You cannot use this spell if you already have a Runic Blessing active on somebody.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus.

NAME: EMPOWER WAND
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Releases a thin stream of pale green lights that slip into a wand. On success, you imbue a wand you can see with one of the following options for one hour: • Increase one bonus it gives by +1 • Pre-load a spell its holder knows, allowing it to be cast once at 1AP • Fortify it, protecting it from magic nullification or other disabling effects • Charge its magic, giving it +1 to any one spell the holder knows • You cannot cast this spell again until the one-hour bonus runs out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take 1/degree option(s), including the same one multiple times.

NAME: BEARER’S INSIGHT
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You can communicate with a wand to gain insight on it or its caster. On success, the GM will give you one useful piece of information about the wand or its caster, your choice. You cannot use this spell again on the same wand unless you’re in a different situation with it. As a warning, if you use this on a boring person’s wand, you’ll get a boring answer.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can learn 1/degree piece(s) of information.

NAME: YAZIR’S WAND STORM
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: If you have access to at least 4 wands, you can cast this spell to command them to form a cloud of wands that float at your command and attack in unison. On success, you can charge one spell you know into the wands and animate them, and they can cast the spell in unison with you, giving you a +4 bonus to that spell. The wand storm lasts until you next go to sleep or fall unconscious, although the spell ends if any of the wands are magically disabled or enter an antimagic area.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can load 1/degree spell(s) into the storm, taking a +(4/6+) bonus to those spells.

NAME: WANDCHOKE
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Releases a bolt of pale green magic that wraps around the target’s wand and prevents magic from flowing through it. On success, the target must roll Agility or Concentration versus your check or have their wand turned into a magicless object for 1 minute. The inventor of this spell faded into obscurity after everyone made jokes and started calling the spell “artichoke” instead.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/1/2+) target(s). The target wand is disabled for up to (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: DOMINATE WAND
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Releases a clap of pale green magic that reverberates at a target’s wand. On success, the target must roll Agility or Concentration against your check or have their wand Dominated for 30 seconds. While you have a wand Dominated, you can cast spells from that wand as if it is your own, without having to touch it, and if they attempt to cast a spell through it, you can choose the target of that spell. In addition, you gain any bonuses from the wand.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target wand is Dominated for (30 seconds/1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes), and you take a +(0/1+) bonus to cast spells through it. On 3 or more degrees of success, they cannot switch their wand until the effect ends.

NAME: SEEK WAND
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a wand without rolling for it to make a magic record of the wand. Once you have, you can cast the spell at any time to attempt to find a wand you have a record of. On success, the GM will give you one clue about where to find the wand. You can only use this spell to find a given wand once until you have found it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You receive 1/degree clue(s) about the target wand’s location.

NAME: LINK WANDS
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: If the casters of two wands, potentially including yourself, are both willing, you can cast this spell on the two wands to create a connection between them. On a success, the two wands are linked, and the bearer of one can tell what the other one is casting through their wand. This connection lasts indefinitely, though either party can terminate it at any point. A wand can only be linked in this way to one wand at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The bearers can (tell what spell the other is casting/speak to each other/communicate telepathically) through their wands. Each bearer can choose (0/1+) spell(s) when this spell is cast that the other bearer is able to cast as if they know it while both wands are active.

NAME: STEAL WAND
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Fires a tether of pale green magic at a target’s wand. On success, the target must roll Endurance or Sleight of Hand versus your check or have their wand ripped from their hands, flying across the tether and into yours. A favorite technique of wandcrafting professors whose students are acting up with their wands in class.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: CRAFTER’S FUSION
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a pale-green magic thread that tethers two or more wands together, linking them intrinsically. On success, you can link 1 wand to your current active wand, treating any wand that is linked to your active wand as being active as well. This effect lasts for 1 hour. Using this spell counts as changing your active wand, which means you cannot change your active wand or use this spell again for 24 hours afterwards.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can link 1/degree wand(s) to your active wand.

NAME: KEY TO THE ARSENAL OF AEONS
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You and the enchanted wands of this cosmos are one. On success, you enter a spectral state, a magic starfield overlay shimmering over your body, as a wreath of spectral wands appears over your shoulders. Choose any Advanced or lower wand when you cast this spell. A spectral version of that wand flies from the wreath of wands and into your hand, and you are now equipped with that wand, and it is considered active. If you would take a Condition, the damage is instead transferred into your wand, and it vanishes, and you must pick a new wand to summon to your hand. You can also voluntarily destroy the spectral wand at any time to take a new one. You can take 3 wands this way, and after 1 minute or after your last wand is destroyed, the spell ends, and your original wand returns to your hand. Wands do not consider this infidelity, so don’t worry.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take 3/degree wands, and the effect lasts for (1 minute/10 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: NEPHERA’S REALIGNMENT
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Floods a target’s body with an icy-cold burst of magic that shocks them out of their wand alignment. On success, a willing target, which can be yourself, can switch which wand they have activated immediately. The target must Resist, and they take a -4 penalty for each time they’ve changed wands this way. This penalty resets when they change a wand normally. Nephera invented this spell trying to cure poison ivy rash, and the wand-realignment thing was accidental. She never did manage to cure poison ivy rash, but the spell is very popular.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus to the Resist check.

NAME: WAND CLOAK
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral bubble of pale green magic. On success, you can stow a wand inside the bubble, which then disappears, making it impossible for anyone to find your wand unless they cast this spell on you, which must beat your initial spell check to make the bubble reappear and drop your wand. You can summon the bubble again at any point to take your wand back. You cannot put anything other than wands inside the bubble. Someone once tried to put his Xbox in the bubble, and we all learned enough from that incident. He never even bought a new Xbox.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can place 1/degree wand(s) inside the bubble.

NAME: YAZIR’S QUICKSTITCH
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Releases a web of pale-green light that snakes around a damaged wand, filling in the damaged parts. On success, you can instantly restore up to 100 materials’ worth of damage on a wand by spending twice as many materials. A popular spell that’s turned into a pejorative anyway, where anyone who throws away twice as much money instead of just doing ten minutes of effort gets wandcrafters muttering “quickstitch” under their breath.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can instantly restore up to 100/degree materials’ worth of damage by spending (2/2/2/1.5/1.5/1.25)x as many materials.

NAME: WISHWAND
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell without a wand without penalties, forming a thin silvery matrix over your fingers on one hand, magic coursing over it like through a wand. On success, you obtain the Wishwand effect for 15 minutes, reducing the penalty for casting without a wand to -4. In addition, if you must roll to cast a spell without anybody noticing, you can take a +1 bonus, as you can cast spells subtly and quietly through your fingers.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Wishwand effect lasts for (15 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours), and reduces the penalty to (-4/-3/-2/-1/0). Take a +1/degree bonus to check to cast spells subtly.

NAME: WAND BOND
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: If someone has a wand equipped that you crafted, any time you make a Read Person or Win Over check against them, you can choose to roll this spell against the same DC instead, connecting with their magic through the link of their wand.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SYLENE’S HARMONY
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on someone you’re friendly with. On success, you link your wand to theirs and create a spectral sigil that glows in pale green on each one, and for 10 minutes, each of you can take the benefits of both wands at once. You can choose to end the effect early. You cannot use this spell again for an hour once it ends. If you harmonize while you have a wand like “powerful stinky garlic breath,” though, they might stop being friendly with you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can link with (1/1/1/2/2/2/3) people, and the effect lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: PASSIONOAK HEART
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You can use this spell any time you set out to craft or repair a wand for somebody else. Roll Charm + Wandcrafting rank, and on success, you can take a +1 to the roll to craft or repair the wand, as you pour your magic out to link with the other person through the wand. It also has a tendency to make you feel good things about the other person, so make sure you don’t get a crush on them. Or do, wandcrafters always have crushes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +1/degree bonus to the roll to craft or repair the target wand.

NAME: BLACKHEART ALIBI
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: When you learn this spell, it will be coupled with another hex, either at your choice from a hex you know or one picked at the GM’s discretion depending on how you learned this spell. You can learn this spell multiple times, coupled with a different hex each time. The AP cost of this spell becomes that of the hex coupled with it. Target a wand as part of casting this spell. If the wand is on somebody’s person, they can roll Concentration versus your spell check to avoid the effect. Otherwise, you pour crackling electric-green magic into the wand, filtering in and leaving it electric to the touch for a few seconds before it settles. Once you have used this on a wand, at any point, you can activate it to have the wand cast the hex coupled with this spell at a target of your choice within range. Any magic to trace the hex will trace it back to whoever is wielding the wand, and not to you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can implant 1/degree instance(s) of the hex, whether on the same wand multiple times or on different wands.

NAME: FEATHERLINK
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a target who has a wand equipped. Roll Charm + Wandcrafting rank versus their Willpower. On success, you create a spectral flame that flickers in the shape of a phoenix’s feather around your wand and theirs, forming a connection between you. On success, you can choose one of the following: • Take the results of Win Over with one degree of success against them (with the player’s consent, if used on a PC) • You can learn one piece of information about their feelings towards you • You can make one statement you believe to be true and have them know that you truly believe it • They also learn about your feelings towards them, and if you harbor negative feelings towards them, you cannot take option 1. Once you have used this spell, you cannot use it on the same person for another 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take 1/degree option(s), including taking the same one multiple times.

NAME: HAYWORTH’S WANDWITHER
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral black eagle that streaks towards a target, plunging into their body and merging with them to corrupt their soul-to-wand magic link. On success, the target must roll Willpower versus your spell check or be Wandwithered, forcing them to Resist twice on a spell backfire instead of once. This effect does not apply if they cast a spell without a wand. The Wandwithered effect lasts indefinitely, but if they destroy all of their wands, it ends the effect on them. If this double-backfire effect Downs them, it triggers a special reaction where they don’t like you anymore. Wait, that’s actually just called “the consequences of your actions.” Hexologists aren’t totally keen on that whole idea.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s). An afflicted target takes a -(0/1+) penalty to Resist checks triggered this way.

NAME: MAGIC MONITOR
SUBJECT: WANDCRAFTING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a thin tendril of pale green magic that snakes around a target wand you touch as part of casting this spell before disappearing inside. If the wand is equipped by an unwilling target, they can roll Perception versus your check to notice the effect and stop it. On success, the target wand becomes Monitored, and you can cast this spell at any point as a DC5 Basic spell to learn one of the following per degree of success: • Who is it equipped by right now, if anyone? • Where is it? • What is the last spell it cast? • What is its current condition? • How many Conditions does the person using it have? • You can learn the last spell it cast multiple times, to learn the last several spells it has cast. You can only roll it as a Basic spell once every 24 hours, but you can have as many wands Monitored as you like. Good if you’re a little nosy and an overbearing friend, which, well, wandcrafters… yeah. I can’t fault their intentions.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: On 3 or more degrees of success, you can target any wand you see, not just those you touch. On 5 or more, you can target any wand close by whose precise location you know.

NAME: MINOR PHANTASM
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates an illusory image. On success, you can conjure any image that fits inside a 1-meter cube. You can choose for it to be stationary or moving, but you must decide the movement it makes when you cast it, and you cannot direct its movement after casting. The illusion lasts for 30 seconds or until you dismiss it. Anyone checking it can make a Comprehend or Perception check versus your spell check to see through it. It does not make sound, although nothing’s stopping you from learning ventriloquism, you know.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can conjure an image that fits inside a cube of 1/degree meter(s) width. The illusion lasts for (30 seconds/1 minute/5 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/24 hours/as long as you like).

NAME: SPECTRAL MASK
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: You can alter your appearance. On a success, you can adjust your appearance to another humanoid appearance not too dissimilar to your own (i.e. similar height, similar build). Anyone checking it can make a Comprehend or Perception check versus your spell check to see through it. This disguise lasts for 10 minutes. Side effects may include identity crises.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can alter your appearance (slightly/to any other human appearance/to anything no bigger than twice your size and no smaller than one quarter your size). The illusion lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: OVERWHELM
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Plants an illusion deep into a target’s mind, driving them to desperate emotions. On success, the target must roll Comprehend versus your check or Resist any non-Wound Condition you choose. If you know a personal fear, weakness, or insecurity of the target, they take a -4 penalty to both checks. Unless the target succeeds on the Comprehend check with 2 or more degrees of success, you can choose for them not to realize they were targeted by a spell, instead believing it came from their own mind or something else in their surroundings. You can cast it on yourself, too, I guess, if you want. Maybe a sensory regulation thing.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: SECOND SELF
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates an illusory duplicate that looks exactly like yourself and follows your commands. On success, you create one duplicate that you can control mentally as long as it’s within sight, and will follow your instructions otherwise. The duplicate lasts for 10 minutes, and anyone checking it can make a Comprehend or Perception check versus your spell check to see through it. It can make sounds and imitate your voice perfectly, but it is not physically corporeal, so no weird kinky ideas, okay?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can create (1/1/2/2/3/3+) duplicate(s), which last(s) for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). On 5 or more degrees of success, you have a telepathic link to your duplicates.

NAME: BRIEF REALITY
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Weaves magic into your illusions to grant them substance. On success, you can choose one illusion you can see and have it become physically corporeal for 1 minute. You cannot cast this spell again until it ends, but you can choose to end the spell early, so you can wait until someone fills that illusory glass with water and is about to drink it before you dispel it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can manifest 1/degree illusion(s) for up to (1 minute/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/3 hours/8 hours).

NAME: MUFFLE
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: A sparkling magic field that settles over the caster. Roll without a DC. Anybody attempting to listen from the outside must make a Concentration or Perception check versus your spell check + 5.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: LIGHT
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a small glowing orb of colored light that can either stay on the tip of the wand or be cast to stay in a place, which will stay in one place indefinitely, but can be traced back to you with a DC10 Analyze roll. You can dismiss any light you’ve placed at any time. The color a person chooses for their light is often treated as a reflection of their personality, which is typically not true, but people find their pseudosciences they like.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: VISIONS OF THE MISTY REALM
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: A primal magic force that creates an entire illusory realm. On a success, you and up to 4 others you can see must succeed on a Comprehend roll versus your spell check or be plunged into an illusory world of your own design. This realm lasts for 10 minutes, and you can adjust everything in the realm immediately to your liking. Anyone in the realm experiences everything in the realm as if it were real, and can attempt to escape (2AP) with a Comprehend check versus your spell check, being forced to Resist on failure. You can leave and reenter the realm at will, but while outside the realm, you aren’t aware of what’s happening inside, and you can’t adjust the realm. You can illusorily disguise yourself perfectly and imperceptibly as anybody trapped inside your realm without a check.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can bring (4/6+) other people into the realm with you, and the realm lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours/as long as you like).

NAME: INVISIBILITY
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: A cloak of magic settles around you, rendering you invisible to the naked eye. On success, you become invisible for 10 minutes. The spell is impossible to see through without a counterspell, but you are only invisible—you can still be heard, felt, or if you haven’t bathed lately, smelled.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The invisibility lasts for (10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/3 hours/8 hours). You can render (0/1+) other willing target(s) invisible with you.

NAME: GLAMOR
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: A classic illusion technique to take on an alternate appearance. You can learn this spell multiple times. When you learn this spell, pick a specific human appearance. On success, you can take that appearance for 10 minutes. Anyone attempting to see through the illusion must roll Comprehend or Perception versus your spell check + 5.
