HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You are disguised for (10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: RESOLUTE GLAMOR
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: A deep-rooted glamor that provides more serious illusory cover than the common Glamor. You can learn this spell multiple times. When you learn this spell, pick a specific human appearance. On success, you take on that appearance for 3 hours. Anyone attempting to see through the illusion must roll Comprehend or Perception versus your spell check + 10. A particular favorite of genderfluid people.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You are disguised for up to (3 hours/24 hours/1 week/any amount of time). On 3 or more degrees of success, only antimagic can counter the effect. On 5 or more degrees of success, you can maintain the effect even in antimagic.

NAME: NONDETECTION
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: A shimmering magic barrier envelops you and up to 4 others. On success, anyone attempting to perceive you in any way must roll Perception versus your spell check + 8. Popular among people doing things they shouldn’t.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Disguises you and up to (4/6+) other people. On 3 or more degrees of success, you are undetectable to any form of magic that doesn’t beat your spell check + 8.

NAME: LITTLE LIE
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Drops a single droplet of multicolored magic onto the ground, which snakes its way over to a target. On success, the target must roll Comprehend versus your spell check + 4, or be closed into an illusion that only they can see and hear. The illusion lasts for 1 minute, and any time the target encounters a sensation that clashes with their perception—for example, they try to pick up something that isn’t there—they can roll Comprehend again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s), and the effect lasts for up to (1 minute/2 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours/3 days/1 week).

NAME: VALEY’S CLOAK
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Casts a shimmering veil of multicolored magic light over an object, swallowing it up into invisibility. On success, a target object within your reach that is small enough to hold in your arms is rendered invisible for 30 seconds. You can end the cloak effect at any point. Keep in mind the object is only made invisible, and if you hit someone with an invisible baseball bat, they’ll still notice.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can render 1/degree target(s) invisible for (30 seconds/1 minute/3 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: DISGUISE OBJECT
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on an object no bigger than your hands and disguise it as something else. On success, the object is disguised as a different object for 10 minutes. Anyone attempting to see through the illusion must roll Analyze versus your spell check. You cannot end the effect early, and you cannot cast this spell again until the effect ends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can increase or decrease the amount of time the object is disguised by 2/degree minutes.

NAME: MARWYN’S STENCH
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a wisp of multicolored magic that swirls around the tip of your wand before it becomes invisible and streaks towards a point of your choosing. On success, you can create an illusory scent at the point of impact, and it cannot be traced back to its caster by any means. The effect lasts for at least 5 minutes, after which time it disappears whenever you will it to or after 1 hour.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The smell can be anything up to a(n) (barely perceptible/subtle/noticeable/prominent/potent/overwhelming/unbearable) level within up to (1/2*) meter(s) of the source.

NAME: NYX’S SMOKE
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a cloud of deep violet magic smoke that swirls outwards and enshrouds a target. On success, you create a cloud of illusion smoke that covers any one effect that allows somebody to detect something from afar, such as a Scry spell, a divination artifact, attunement to an artifact that can sense its surroundings, a divination rune, or even nonmagical effects like a security camera, for 5 minutes, during which time the detection appears to continue as normal but is only seeing a simulated version of what it was looking at. The smoke is still visible to anyone looking normally, however.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The smoke lasts for up to (5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). On 3 or more degrees of success, anybody looking normally must roll Perception versus your spell check to see the smoke.

NAME: BLACKSKULL HAZE
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Fires a bolt of crackling multicolored magic energy that strikes a person and afflicts their perception. On success, the target must roll Comprehend versus your check or be afflicted for 30 seconds with one of the following conditions of your choice: • Cannot run • -6 to Perception • All targeted spells miss • Cannot pick things up or operate objects • Vision is blurred at more than 2 meters distance • Cannot hear • You can choose 1/degree option(s), and the effect lasts for (30 seconds/1 minute/2 minutes/3 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can choose to have the spell be invisible and untraceable back to you.

NAME: TRUNDALE’S MISCHIEF
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a spectral figure that looks like a small demonic figure that crackles once before it disappears. On success, you place an enchantment over the area you are in and describe what you want people to detect if they use divination on that space in the time you were there. Any divination magic that doesn’t roll higher than your spell check + 8 will see the fake situation you described instead of what actually happened. Nobody knows what happened to the infamous rascal Trundale, but a part of him is said to live on in the little demonic figure summoned by this spell, which will giggle if the fake scenario you have in mind is particularly devious. Illusionists take a giggling Trundale as a great badge of honor.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: NIGHTMARE BLADE
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a crackling magic energy that forms itself into an illusory weapon and attacks a target. On success, a target must roll Comprehend versus your spell check or be so convinced by your illusion that they perceive themselves as being actually wounded by it, and they must Resist Wound versus your spell check. If they receive a stack of Wound in this way, it only lasts for 10 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s). You can choose for the Wound inflicted this way to last any amount of time up to (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: FLICKERFAKE
SUBJECT: ILLUSION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a halo of silvery magic that settles over an object. On success, you can place a magic effect on the object to make a nonmagical object appear magical under inspection, or make a magical object appear nonmagical or of a different type of magic, for example, making an artifact appear like a regular object or making artificy checks to study it reveal different answers about what it does. Any check to determine its true nature must beat your spell check + 6 or instead uncover the false nature. If you fail the roll, you leave a permanent trace instead that you were casting magic on it, and even worse, your illusionist friends will laugh at you because this one’s really hard to mess up that badly.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SHATTER
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Sends a wave of thin, electric-blue magic shatter lines out from the tip of your wand with a loud crash. On success, you emit a wave of destructive force that can break objects in the effect range, and anyone caught in the burst must roll Endurance versus your check or be forced to Resist. Essentially for when you’re too special to use a hammer.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: SHAPE EARTH
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a cloud of sparkling blue magic that lances into the earth. On success, you can reform up to 1 cubic meter of earth as if it were an extension of your own body. The earth will glow for a while with your magic trace left on it, so it’s not a good way to hide a body.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can reform up to (1/2*) cubic meter(s) of earth.

NAME: CONDENSE AIR
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Presses air down into a solidified form, creating a physical object. On success, you can create a small, simple object out of condensed air that will last for 1 minute. If you move the object slowly, it can pass through anything that air can pass through, but if you move it quickly, it will act as a solid object.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can make an object that fits in (your hand/your arms/a 1-meter cube/a 2-meter cube/a 3-meter cube/a 4-meter cube), and it will last up to (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: FLIGHT
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Propels you through three dimensions with a shudder of magic energy that ripples through the air. On a success, you can fly slowly for 1 minute. A wave of air fires out in every direction around you when you land or take off, disturbing your surroundings.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You fly at (0.5/1/1.5/2/3+)x your running speed for (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/1 hour). On 4 or more degrees of success, you can take off silently.

NAME: AVIDAR’S WINGS
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral set of glowing blue wings that carve the air around you, giving you the ability to fly at twice your running speed for extended periods. On success, you can fly freely for 1 hour. You can retract the wings to hide them and re-extend them at any point during this time. While flying, you can take a +2 to Body checks. The wings also offer you the benefit of looking pretty cool, which is the most important part.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can fly at (2/4+)x your running speed for (1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). Take a +(2/3+) bonus to Body checks while flying.

NAME: BURST
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a small blue orb of rune-covered magic that bursts shortly after. The burst isn’t enough to break anything sturdy or hurt somebody, but you can scare the living daylights out of someone who’s getting too relaxed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: LYLA’S ENCHANTED FIRE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a magic dancing flame that reacts to your feelings. On a success, you can create a flame that burns whatever color you like. Choose one option for the flame’s properties: • The flame doesn’t spread. • The flame stays until extinguished. • The flame is harmless. • The flame is harmless for a select few people. • You can control the flame as if it were an extension of your body.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose 1/degree option(s) for the flame properties, or you can spend a degree of success to create a second, separate flame. You can choose which properties apply to which flames, if you’ve taken multiple.

NAME: VALYNAR’S WATER SPRITE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a web of thin electric-blue magic threads that weave into a figure. On a success, you create a Water Sprite in a body of water big enough to fit it, a replica of yourself made of water, for 10 minutes. It moves as if it were an extension of your body, and you can choose whether to perceive through its senses or your own. The Water Sprite can leave the water you summon it into, but only for 1 minute at a time before it collapses and reforms in the nearest body of water big enough to fit it. Please do not drink your own water sprite. It’s really, really weird.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Water Sprite lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/2 hours/8 hours/24 hours), and can stay out of the water for (1 minute/10 minutes/1 hour/indefinitely). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can disguise the Water Sprite to look exactly like a person you choose, including yourself, indistinguishable except by touch.

NAME: SPECTER OF THE FORGOTTEN STORM GOD
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Elemental fury distorts the air around you, swathing you in wrathful darkness. On a success, you are cloaked in a wreath of storms, dark clouds suspending you and carrying you aloft as they crackle with lightning magic. You can fly at 5 times your regular movement speed, and lightning magic moves at your will. You can force anybody you see (1AP) to roll Agility versus your skill check or be struck by lightning and forced to Resist. Additionally, you can convert yourself into lightning and move at light speed, causing an explosion if you hit something that will destroy most objects nearby, potentially start fires, and force anyone close by to roll Endurance versus your skill check or Resist two stacks. You can launch or become lightning 5 times or use this spell for 5 minutes, before it ends with a thunderclap that rings through the sky.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You fly at 5/degree times your regular movement speed, and you can launch or become lightning (5/8+) times or use the spell for 5/degree minutes before it ends.

NAME: IGNIS
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Ignites an enchanted fire inside someone’s soul that spreads through to every aspect of their being. On success, the target must roll Concentration versus your spell check or be inflicted with Ignis, where their body is wracked with pain that worsens the more they pay attention to it. Any time something happens to shake their focus, they must roll Concentration versus your spell check or Resist on failure, and they take a -2 to each check for each Condition they have. This spell lasts 30 minutes, but nobody makes it that long. Lucky targets pass out. Unlucky ones die. You shouldn’t cast this spell on someone you like.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s). The target takes a -2/degree penalty to their checks for each Condition they have.

NAME: SAMVAL’S BURNING CONDUIT
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a magic conduit formed of glowing blue light over an object. You can heat or cool the object by a small amount on success, the conduit pulling the heat or cold in and glowing with a fiery or icy aura. You cannot use this spell on the same object again until it has returned to its original temperature.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can heat or cool the target object by (5/10/20/30/50+) degrees Celsius.

NAME: MASTER OF FROST
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons an electric-blue light over your hands that crackles intensely. On success, you can manipulate ice and snow as if it were an extension of your body on sight, up to an amount about twice what you could lift, and once per minute, you can flash-freeze something (1AP), drastically lowering the temperature. This effect lasts for 5 minutes. Good for if you’re having a duel to the death in a blizzard or if you’re making a nice frosty milkshake.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can control (2/3/4/6/10+)x an amount of snow and ice that you could physically lift, and the effect lasts for (5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour). On 4 or more degrees of success, you can flash-freeze a creature, forcing it to roll Endurance or be forced to Resist Wound.

NAME: STORMSTEP
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Lightning magic crackles around your feet as you walk. On success, you gain Stormstep for 30 seconds, during which time you can run at 2 times your regular speed and jump 2 times your regular height or distance. If you make an Athletics check to run or jump during this period, take a +2 to the check. You can drop down from a height to land with a thunderous crash, ending the Stormstep effect immediately and forcing everyone nearby to roll Agility or Endurance versus your check or Resist.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Stormstep lasts for (30 seconds/1 minute/3 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour), during which time you run and jump 2/degree times faster and farther. Take a +2/degree bonus to Athletics checks to run or jump.

NAME: WINDBORN
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell any time you fall from a height to either glide gently or catch yourself safely just before hitting the ground, as the wind responds to your will and guides you to safety. Good for making a dramatic entrance or a dramatic exit, especially if they don’t know you’re an evoker and you get to just say “bye” and jump off a cliff.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: DEPTH WALKER
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a swirling whirlpool of water magic that surrounds you, shielding you from the depths. On success, you gain Depth Walker for 10 minutes, letting you move freely at walking speed in any direction underwater and breathe underwater, as a shield of water magic surrounds you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can bring (0/1+) additional target(s) with you, and Depth Walker lasts for (10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). The effect lets you move at (1/1/1.5/1.5/2/3+)x your walking speed underwater.

NAME: SONGWON’S STRIDE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds you with a swirl of electric-blue magic that envelops you before taking off with you like a bolt of lightning. On success, you can move to any point you can see with an unobstructed path in a blink, hitting with an explosion. Anyone nearby to the landing must roll Endurance or Agility or be forced to Resist, but you must also Resist. At the GM’s discretion, you may also be able to break through obstacles on the way to your target.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: On 2 or more degrees of success, you don’t need to Resist on landing. You can bring (0/1+) additional people with you.

NAME: FROSTFINGER
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a swell of magic that flares up from your fingertip and ripples out to the space around you. On a success, you can raise or lower the temperature of the space around you. The spell leaves few traces of its use, and you can cast it subtly, in which case anyone trying to detect it must roll Perception versus your spell check + 6, and you can also choose how quickly the temperature change comes on. The effect lasts for 10 minutes, during which time you can continue to change the temperature, although anyone attempting to detect your effect can roll Perception again any time you change the temperature again. Once the effect ends, the temperature returns gradually to normal.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can specify 1/degree target(s) to be immune to the temperature change, and the effect lasts for 10/degree minutes. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can change the temperature enough that people (and other creatures at the GM’s discretion) must roll Endurance or be forced to Resist if they spend at least (5/5/5/4/3/2/1) minute(s) in the space.

NAME: SPECTRAL STRIKE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Launches a bolt of electric blue magic energy that streaks towards a target within sight. On success, the target must roll Agility or Endurance versus your spell check or be struck and forced to Resist. The spell effect is loud and bright enough that it cannot be cast subtly, even if you have an effect that would otherwise let you do so, but you can fire it from any distance as long as you can still see the target, so if you want to beat someone up and get away with it, I guess just stay as far away as possible. Doesn’t make it not a dick move though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: CIRCUITBREAKER
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds your hand with crackling blue magic energy, tiny electric impulses dancing between your fingers, allowing you to interface with an electronic device you touch. Roll against a DC set by the GM based on the complexity of the device (10-35), for example, an electronic lock is very easily flipped, while breaching security protocols on a computer server will be incredibly difficult. If you fail by two or more degrees of failure, the GM will decide whether you damage the device or if you must Resist.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: On 3 or more degrees of success, you retain an arcane memory of the device and can use this spell on it again taking 1 degree of success instead of rolling.

NAME: INKSPINNER
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a swell of dark blue magic energy that settles in lines over your face, making your eyes glow electric blue. On success, you gain the Inkspinner status for 5 minutes, allowing you to control any liquid you see as if it is an extension of your body. You can only control the liquid you can see, so if a liquid is in an opaque container, you can only control the amount on the surface. You can only control one distinct body of liquid at a time, and you can move it freely through three dimensions as quickly as you can move your hand. A powerful spell wasted on evokers, who are typically just using it to funnel cheap beer into their mouths.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Inkspinner status lasts for 5/degree minutes, and you can control 1/degree distinct liquid(s) at once. You can move the liquids at (1/1.5/2/3+)x the speed you can move your hand.

NAME: FREYA’S FIREWALL
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Coats the caster in a shimmering veil of spectral blue mist that settles into their skin. On success, you obtain the Firewall status for 10 minutes, making you immune to heat and cold. The very symbol of overconfidence as a spell, where people think they can walk into a burning building not realizing they’ll still choke on the smoke.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant Firewall to (0/1+) additional target(s). The status lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: MINDJOLT
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Fires off a spark of electric energy that scrambles a target’s mind. Roll against a target’s Concentration or Comprehend. On success, the target must choose whether to Resist, fall unconscious for 1 minute, or forget the last 1 minute. This spell fails if the target doesn’t have a brain or something like it, so it will work on creatures as lowly as a worm, but not on most enchanted objects, spectral entities, or sufficiently dumb jocks.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target must choose 1/degree option(s), which can be the same one multiple times.

NAME: FLASHFOOT
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a jolt of pure magic force that surrounds you like a crackling aura. On success, you can fly at 10 times your running speed for the next 1 minute. At the GM’s discretion, anytime you attempt to make a difficult or precise maneuver with this flight, you may need to roll Agility to make it or have this spell end early. A great spell if you’re in a hurry and don’t mind a few broken bones.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You fly at (10/15+) times your running speed for the next (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour). Add (0/1+) to any Agility checks to pull off difficult maneuvers.

NAME: FIRE EYES
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a small mote of fire that follows after any traces of heat it can sense. On success, you create one Fire Eye, which will follow the path that the last heat source took from a point you specify, as long as the path has not been disturbed by other sudden or extreme temperature changes in that time. The Fire Eye lasts until it reaches its target or until you dispel it, which you can do instantly at any point.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create 1/degree Fire Eye(s), which can track different targets or the same one. If multiple Fire Eyes track the same target, they will pass by any changes in heat along the path and dispel one Fire Eye in the process.

NAME: WATCH YOUR STEP
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral manacle with a freezing-cold aura that implants itself into a surface and disappears. On success, a target surface you touch is implanted with a magic energy that can only be detected with a Perception roll versus your spell check + 4. Anybody who steps within arm’s reach must roll Agility versus your spell check or be trapped as the magic erupts in a freezing snare, rendering them magically frozen and unaware of their surroundings for 30 seconds. You can specify any number of people to be immune. You can also specify someone to not be immune. That doesn’t change anything, but it might help you make a point if you’re petty.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The snare attempts to freeze the closest 1/degree creature(s) not given immunity.

NAME: PHOENIX FLARE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a tip of brilliant fiery magic at the tip of your wand that churns like a miniature sun. On success, you create a fireball the size of a basketball that you can hold at the tip of your wand or a finger, and behaves like a physical object that you can place, throw, or target with any magic that works on objects, even ones limited to nonmagical substances. After 1 minute, the sphere explodes, forcing everybody within 3 meters to Resist. You can choose to detonate the sphere earlier, and you can choose whether the detonation destroys objects around it or just hurts creatures. The spell comes up so much in Enforcers’ disciplinary reports that they have stamps with the spell name on it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create 1/degree spheres that last for up to (1/3/10/30/60) minute(s) and have a blast radius of (3/4+) meters. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can create a subtle sphere that can only be detected with a Perception roll against your spell check.

NAME: WRECKING BALL
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a swirl of pure magic force that circles your body faster and faster until it fires in the direction of your wand. On success, you unleash a blast of force that can shatter most physical surfaces but has no effect on creatures. If a Warding effect contests this spell, treat your spell check as doubled against that effect. Designed to break even the sturdiest of wards, this spell still doesn’t defeat an evoker’s greatest enemy: adult responsibilities.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You launch 1/degree blast(s) of force, whether at the same target or multiple.

NAME: SAYA’S SPECTRAL SILK
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Draws a shimmering pink string of pure fire energy in the air that streaks towards a heat source in the area to become one with it. On success, you can choose one nonmagical, inorganic target you can see that emits an amount of heat that is noticeable to the touch, and you can control the object as if it were an extension of yourself for 10 seconds. Known for getting people on technicalities when evokers try to bring the TV remote to their hand and instead pull the batteries out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can control the object for (10 seconds/1 minute/10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours). You gain (0/1+) piece(s) of information about the target object.

NAME: SPARKSOUL
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Links your consciousness to pure electric energy. On success, you gain 3 Sparks, crackling points of magic energy the size of a fingertip that course around you. You can activate one of your Sparks at any point, briefly transforming yourself to a pure electric current and moving at the speed of light along any inorganic conductive path, traveling near-instantly up to 10 kilometers to any other point along the path. This increases the voltage along the path in a way that may break microchip circuitry and be detected in low-voltage systems, but your passage is imperceptible in high-voltage systems. Sparks persist indefinitely, and the only drawback is that when you come out of using one, you get a taste in your mouth like you sucked on a battery.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain 3/degree Sparks, each of which can take you up to a maximum of (10/30/50/100+) kilometers.

NAME: SONGWON’S SHIELD
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Emits a rippling wave of magic force from the tip of your wand that spills out to form a wall. On success, you form a magic barrier up to 10 square meters at a point you can see, shaped however you like, but only along one plane in space. Choose what the wall is made of when you create it: • Pure force: Anybody attempting to pass through who doesn’t roll Athletics versus your spell check is instead thrown backwards • Ice: Creates a solid wall of pure ice six inches thick that is treated as magical • Fire: Anybody who passes through unprotected must Resist • Electricity: The wall is undetectable until somebody passes through, in which case they must roll Endurance or be forced to Resist, after which the wall disappears • The wall lasts for 1 hour or until you dispel it, which you can do instantly from anywhere.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create 1/degree wall(s) at point(s) you can see. You can choose each wall type separately.

NAME: FLASH FLARE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Conjures a small flame in the palm of your hand that you can throw in a straight line up to 10 meters. Anyone caught in the path must roll Agility, Athletics or Endurance or be forced to Resist Wound. The flame can ignite anything highly flammable, but it isn’t enough to catch on ordinary wood or anything less flammable.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can launch 1/degree flares up to 10/degree meters, whether at the same target or multiple. If you launch multiple flares at one target, the target rolls once for all of them, with a -1 penalty for each flare past the first.

NAME: ICEBOX
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Coalesces water from the air into a frozen block. On success, you create a block of ice up to 10 grams in the palm of your hand. The ice always takes the shape of a cube, but you can choose for it to be hollow or filled, and for it to have any number of sides open. The ice created is mundane and nonmagical, and lasts indefinitely. Or until it melts. Ice does that.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create a block of ice up to (10 grams/20 grams/50 grams/100 grams/500 grams/1 kilogram/5 kilograms/10 kilograms/20 kilograms/50 kilograms/100 kilograms).

NAME: SNAP SWITCH
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: A jolt of electric magic flickers between your fingertips and lashes out invisibly to interface with something you can see, sending just enough of a jolt to power on basic equipment and close electrical circuits. If the path is blocked or if the target is protected, such as activating a computer or heavy machinery, the GM may ask you to roll against a suitable DC.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: MOLEFOOT
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds you with a swirl of churning earth-based magic energy, glyphs shining around your hands and feet and linking you with the earth. On success, you can burrow through soft earth surfaces at your walking speed for 5 minutes, although anything harder than dry clay will block your path. To avoid architectural damage, there’s a lot of regulations around using this spell. Those regulations are ignored.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can burrow at 1/degree time(s) your walking speed for (5/10/20/40/60) minutes, and you can pass through material no harder than (dry clay/soft stone/solid stone/concrete/metal ore/steel).

NAME: STONY FORM
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Imbues your physical form with the magic of the earth, rendering your skin like stone. On success, you take a +1 to Endurance checks and any checks to resist being moved for the next 1 minute, and your weight is doubled. It also makes you smell pleasantly like moss and peat, so that’s a good bonus.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +1/degree bonus to Endurance checks and any checks to resist being moved for the next (1 minute/2 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: FLASH FREEZE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Unleashes a bolt of highly chaotic icy force at a target. Roll against a target’s Willpower or Endurance. On success, the target is put into a frozen stasis and for the next 5 minutes or until awoken by any force or magic used on them. The target doesn’t experience anything during this time, their biological needs also freezing, including aging, which, I guess you could use this on yourself to extend your lifespan by a few minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target is put into stasis for up to (5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours/3 days/1 week/2 weeks/1 month/2 months/3 months/6 months/1 year).

NAME: VORTEX
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a swirl of pure magic force at a point you can see. On success, you create a Vortex that exerts a small amount of force pulling everything within 1 meter towards it, proportionally more powerful the closer it is to the center of the Vortex. The Vortex lasts for 5 minutes, during which time you cannot cast this spell again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose a radius for the Vortex up to 1/degree meter(s), and a duration between (5 minutes/4 minutes/3 minutes/2 minutes/1 minute/30 seconds/10 seconds/5 seconds/1 second) and (5 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: THUNDER GOD’S WREATH
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a wreath of crackling lightning energy around your head, imbuing you with a powerful lightning enchantment. On success, you gain 3 Bolts, and you can launch one in any direction you see, where it travels in a straight line for up to 500 meters. The first target along that path must roll Endurance or be forced to Resist. While you still have Bolts, you can fly at your walking speed. Unspent Bolts disappear after 10 minutes. If you’ve ever dreamed of being Zeus, this spell gets you halfway there. Transfiguration magic and terrible judgment gets you the other half.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You gain 3/degree Bolts that last for up to (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/any amount of time).

NAME: FAIRY LEAP
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Bestows a wind-based fey enchantment onto yourself, allowing you to leap great distances. Whenever you would roll a Skill to jump, you can instead roll this spell against the same DC.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SONGWON’S SKYBLADE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Extends your wand into a massive blade of pure force, crackling with furious magic energy. On success, you can swing your wand as a blade, forcing anybody within 3 meters to roll Agility or Endurance against your spell check + 6 or be forced to Resist, taking two stacks of a condition on failure. The blade also cleaves through most nonrunic surfaces and can even be concentrated fully on one rune of 3 or fewer glyphs to destroy it. A ferociously powerful spell that makes you capable of taking down almost any target instantly. Not a full dragon, though. Songwon found that one out the hard way.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The blade extends for (3/5+) meters and gives a -(0/2+) penalty to the opponent’s Resist roll.

NAME: SCARS OF ETERNAL HELLFIRE
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Taps into evocation’s ancestral legacy through the great dragon lords who laid waste in cleansing fire. On success, you enter the Hellfire state for 5 minutes, during which time you sprout massive wings of pure fire that allow you to fly at 5 times your running speed. While in this state, you can unleash a gout of flame (1AP) by pointing your finger, forcing every target in a straight line to roll Agility or Endurance versus your spell check or be forced to Resist, or you can spend 30 seconds to unleash a flare at your location, forcing everybody within 10 meters of you to Resist. Each time you Down a creature with 2 or more max Resolve, the Hellfire state extends for 5 minutes, and your spell check is treated as being 1 higher. If you spend 1 hour in Hellfire, the magic explodes, ending the effect and forcing you and everybody within 30 meters of you to Resist, being instantly Downed on failure. It also makes you scary and might help if someone is bullying you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Hellfire state lasts for (5/10/20/30/50/60) minutes, and you fly at (5/10/20/40/80/150/300) times your running speed while active.

NAME: FLAMING PRISON
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a wave of fiery force that encloses an area, assailing the consciousness of anybody inside. On success, you can enclose an area shaped as you like, up to 20 cubic meters, and anybody who is completely inside the spell effect must roll Concentration against your spell check or be scorched and forced to Resist. The spell lasts for 10 minutes, during which time anybody who tries to enter or exit the area must make the same Concentration roll. You can end the effect early, if, for example, you realize you need to go inside, or that maybe it was a bad idea to get mad at your professor and lock them in a flaming prison.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can enclose an area up to (20/40/80/120/180) cubic meters for up to (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours/any amount of time).

NAME: GOLDEN HAND
SUBJECT: EVOCATION
DESCRIPTION: Fires a pulse of pure force energy from your hand. One target of your choice within 10 feet must roll Agility or Endurance versus your check or be pushed backwards or, on two ore more degrees of failure, forced to Resist. You can cast this spell without any penalties from casting subtly or without a wand.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose 1/degree target(s) within (10/25/50/100+) feet to be affected. You can manifest the attack as pure force( only/ or fire/, fire or electricity/, fire, electricity or water/, fire, electricity, water or ice).

NAME: CALVAR’S SAVING LIGHT
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch a creature as part of casting this spell. A gentle blue light fills any wounds they have. Instantly heals any wounds or other small injuries that don’t lead to a Condition or other mechanical impairment.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: MERCY’S WATER
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a blue magic that coalesces into a liquid. One success, you create one dose of this liquid, and anyone who drinks this liquid will restore 2 Conditions every time they would restore 1 from sleeping. The drawback is that it’s sickly-sweet watermelon flavor.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create 1/degree dose(s) of Mercy’s Water.

NAME: SAINT’S TOUCH
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch a creature as part of casting this spell. Blue light forms a lattice over any injuries they have and restores them to health. On success, clear 1 stack of Wound from the target. You cannot cast this spell again for 8 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You cannot cast this spell again for (8/6/4/3/2/1) hour(s).

NAME: BALM
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch a creature as part of casting this spell. On success, you create a small glowing magic symbol unique to you that floats close to the recipient. If they rest with this spell active for 1 hour, the spell restores 1 non-Wound condition stack, as it draws the negative energies out of them. You cannot cast this spell again until it finishes. A popular spell after exams, to get over the deep depression of getting REST-312 exam results back.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can place 1/degree Balm(s) on separate targets.

NAME: PURIFY
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a bolt of blue light that streaks towards a target, dissolving toxins on impact. On success, you can remove one poison or sickness effect from the target. Cures hangovers and is thus the most precious spell the morning after a party.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can remove 1/degree poison or sickness effect(s), which can be multiple from one person or spread over different targets.

NAME: WINGS OF THE GUARDIAN ANGEL
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: The heavens’ saving grace flows through your veins, rendering you an avatar of mercy. On success, glowing blue spectral wings sprout from your body, and a caduceus of golden light appears in your hands. For the next 30 minutes, you can fly, and you can bestow blessings with your caduceus (1AP). You have 3 Blessings, and for each Blessing, you can choose one of the following: • Remove all stacks of one Condition • Grant invulnerability for 1 minute • Grant a +6 to a given Stat for 1 minute • Remove all negative states other than Conditions affecting a person • Grant a +10 to two different Abilities for 1 minute • The spell effect ends early if you run out of Blessings. The spell is also said to make you look more attractive while it’s active, but it might just be a confidence thing.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You have 3/degree Blessings.

NAME: HERO’S STRENGTH
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: On a success, you create a spectral glowing blue version of the target person, which merges with their body and fills them with strength, removing all stacks of Fear and Doubt and giving a +3 to Willpower for the next 5 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +3/degree bonus to Willpower.

NAME: DIVINE GIFT
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch a target as part of casting this spell and choose one Ability. For the next 24 hours, the target has a +2 to checks with that Ability. You cannot cast this spell again until its duration runs out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: GENTLE REPOSE
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds a target with a soft shimmering light that guides them to rest. On success, you imbue one person with Repose. A person with Repose can get a full night of sleep in 4 hours, but must get a proper night of sleep before they can benefit from this spell again. You cannot cast this spell again until the target with Repose has used it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant Repose to 1/degree target(s), who can get a full night of sleep in (4/3/2/1) hour(s).

NAME: SATE
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: On success, you instantly and magically satisfy all of one person’s physical needs, such as eating, drinking, or their caffeine addiction. A person must be fully rested and nonmagically meet their needs before they can benefit from this spell again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: INDOMITABLE WILL
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Bestows a magic devotion into a target. On success, the target can treat 0 Resolve as if they are at 1 Resolve for 5 minutes. All Conditions are still taken as normal, so anyone who is still at 0 Resolve at the end of the spell will be Downed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s), and the effect lasts for (5/10/20/30/60) minutes.

NAME: CONVICTION
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral chest piece that settles over a target and strengthens their heart. On a success, the target is rendered immune to Doubt for 10 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target is immune to Doubt for (10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: MAGIC SKIN
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Imbues a target with a shimmering blue light that forms a second skin over them before fading away. On success, the target gains Magic Skin for 10 minutes, during which time they have a +4 to all spell backfire checks. You can choose to end the Magic Skin effect on someone early at any time you choose. You can only have one Magic Skin active at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant Magic Skin to 1/degree target(s), which gives a +(4/5+) to spell backfire checks for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: HERCULEAN MIGHT
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a series of pale, glowing strips of light that wrap around a person’s joints, setting into their skin as just a barely visible glow effect. For the next hour, they can take a +1 bonus to all Body checks. You cannot cast this spell again until the effect has run out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus to Body checks while the effect is active.

NAME: DELAIR’S DIVINE DIAGNOSIS
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch a person as part of casting this spell. Magic flows out of your fingertips and into their body, giving you an insight into their state. You can use this spell without rolling, and it will tell you anything that is negatively affecting the target’s physical state. Advanced magic effects may evade this spell’s notice, but even in that case, you’ll be able to tell something is wrong and that it is magic beyond your ability.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SAVING GRACE
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: When someone you see takes a Condition, you can roll this spell to shield them temporarily with restorative magics. On success, the condition is instead taken 5 minutes later. Some people might pan this spell as just delaying the inevitable, but others argue that when the inevitable is bleeding out, delaying it is actually pretty cool.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Condition onset is delayed by (5/10/15/20/30/45/60) minutes.

NAME: LI HUAN’S STEEL HEART
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Imbues a target with radiant resolve that makes them harder to shake. The target takes a +1 to Willpower and Endurance for the next hour. You cannot cast this spell again until the hour is up. Restorers get tired of evokers asking for this spell before they go beating each other up, trying to convince the evokers of some silly idea like “just don’t beat each other up.”
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree to Willpower and Endurance checks while the effect is active.

NAME: LITTLE BIRD OF HOPE
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a small spectral bird that leaves a shimmering effect behind its wings and settles into a target, merging with them. On success, you can restore one stack of Despair or Loss from the target. You cannot cast this spell again for 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You cannot cast this spell again for (24/16/12/8/4/3/2/1) hour(s).

NAME: ACUITY
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons two bands of brilliant blue light lined with sigils that settle around a target and sink into their body. On success, the target takes a +1 to Comprehend, Research, and Recall Information for the next 24 hours, as the magic settles with a sense of spectral clarity into the target’s mind. You cannot use this spell again until the spell effect ends. The infirmary always gets a couple students who “got a light sprain” and ask if maybe they could get topped up with this spell while they’re there whenever exams are about to start.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +1/degree bonus to Comprehend, Research, and Recall Information.

NAME: MAGIC RUSH
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Floods a target with a brilliant swell of magic energy that temporarily numbs all the pain. On success, you can remove all of a target’s conditions for 10 minutes, at the end of which they return, adding to any new ones taken since then. If the Conditions returning Downs the target, they fall unconscious regardless of what type of Conditions they have. Once you cast this spell, you cannot cast it again for an hour.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target’s Conditions are removed for (10/20/30/40/50/60) minutes.

NAME: WINDRAISER’S POWER STORM
SUBJECT: RESTORATION
DESCRIPTION: Pulls up a massive, crackling bolt of magic energy that you can launch into a willing target, including yourself, plunging into their soul and leaving their eyes glowing brilliant blue. On success, the target enters the Power Storm state for 10 minutes, taking a +4 to one spell chosen when this spell is cast, but they cannot cast any other spells until the state ends. You cannot cast this spell again until the effect ends, and a single spell cannot receive more than one Power Storm bonus at a time. But really, how many do you need?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target can choose 1/degree spell(s) to receive the Power Storm effect.

NAME: BESTOW MOVEMENT
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Bestows a fragment of telekinetic energy into an object. On success, the object becomes animated and capable of moving freely in three dimensions for 1 minute. It will obey your will, but only roughly. The object doesn’t require your attention to maintain movement, and if not attended to, will loosely follow you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The object becomes animated for (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: DISTANT GRASP
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell without a wand without penalty. Creates a spectral matrix you can reach your hand into, controlling a telekinetic system to manipulate an object at a distance. On success, you can manipulate an object you can see up to 10 meters away with the same dexterity as if you were holding it in your hands for 30 seconds.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can manipulate an object you can see up to 10/degree meters away for up to (30 seconds/1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes). You can change to a different object within range during the effect (0/1+) time(s).

NAME: ELERY’S CANNON
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Gathers an explosive storm of indigo magic that crackles around your hand and around a target in sight before launching it explosively. On success, you can launch an object you can see in any direction. Anyone in the way must make an Agility check against your spell check or Resist Wound. As far as great mages go, Elery was kind of violent. Unsurprisingly, he died young.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can launch 1/degree object(s). If someone is in the path of multiple, they make one Agility check to evade them all, with a -1 penalty for each object past the first.

NAME: SHOVE
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: You can push on a target you can see about as hard as you can shove with your hand. If casting on a creature, roll versus the target’s Endurance, pushing them off-balance on success. Repeated uses on the same target get weaker. Lets you push things out of people’s hands and I guess generally just be a dick.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SUSPENSION BARRIER
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: You can surround yourself with knives, jagged metal, rapidly vibrating wire, or something else dangerous. On a success, you pull objects from your surroundings to create a dangerous suspension field around you for 5 minutes. You can cut or break objects by being near them, and projectiles that don’t beat your spell check are destroyed before they reach you. Anyone close to you must roll Agility against your spell check to get away from you or Resist Wound.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Your Suspension Barrier lasts for up to (5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can use ultrafine materials to create an invisible Suspension Barrier.

NAME: MARIONETTE
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Takes telekinetic control of another person, forcing them to do your bidding. On success, the target must roll Agility versus your check or be under your control for 30 seconds per degree of failure. You only control their physical form—it’s less mind control and more yanking them into things.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: CONSTRUCT
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Draws from the material world around to build something. On success, you can create a simple object no bigger than your hand. The construct lasts for 30 seconds, after which the magic holding it together ends and it crumbles. Like playing with Play-Doh, but for when you’re too insecure to play with kids’ toys.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can create up to 1/degree simple object(s) no bigger than (your hand/your head/your torso/yourself/twice your size).

NAME: LEVITATE
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds a target with long, thin ribbons of indigo magic to lift them off the ground. On success, you can either grant yourself levitation for 1 minute, where you can move freely through three dimensions at half your walking speed, or you can levitate somebody else. If they resist, they can make an Agility check versus your spell check to escape.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can move the target at (0.5/1/1.5/2/3+)x walking speed for up to (1 minute/5 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: MASS CONTROL
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Ignites a flare of brilliant indigo magic in your irises, widely regarded as the symbol for telekinetics. Grants Mass Control for 1 minute, during which time you can telekinetically control 3 objects as if using your hand. You can only control anything light enough to lift with one hand, and any check that requires finesse with any of the objects takes a -4 penalty.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Mass Control lasts for (1 minute/2 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/1 hour), and lets you control (3/6/10/15+) objects light enough to lift with one hand.

NAME: PERSISTENT CONTROL
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Imbues something with a deep telekinetic connection, a cloud of faint indigo magic swirling around it when it moves. On success, an object no heavier than you could lift is under your direct telekinetic control for 1 hour, with as much dexterity as if you were holding it in your hand. If any antimagic ever lies on a direct path between you and the object, the connection is severed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take telekinetic control of 1/degree object(s) no heavier than you could lift for (1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours/1 week/indefinitely).

NAME: MASTER OF THY ORBIT
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: The space around you bends to your will. A field of glowing indigo magic erupts on the ground for 5 meters around you and lasts for 1 minute. While active, everything in this field is under your direct telekinetic control, and you can move it as if you are moving yourself. Anybody caught in this space can attempt to escape with an Agility check versus your spell check + 5. It’s hard to keep track of all the things you have floating when you do it, but hey, whatever makes you look badass.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The field is 5/degree meter(s) wide, and lasts for (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/4 hours).

NAME: GRASP
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: When you want to make a check that requires touch on an object within sight, you can roll this spell. On success, you can perform the check at a distance with a -4 penalty.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can perform the check at a distance with a (-4/-3/-2/-1/+0/+1/+2) modifier.

NAME: INVISIBLE BONDS
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Sweeps a swath of indigo magic around a target that flares brighter before tightening on them. On success, a target you can see must roll Agility or Athletics versus your spell check or be restrained, a telekinetic force grabbing them to restrain either their arm movement or leg movement for 10 seconds.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target is restrained for (10 seconds/1 minute/5 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). On 4 or more degrees of success, you can restrain their movement completely.

NAME: LYRIC’S JUMP
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Creates a burst of silent, invisible telekinetic force that someone can use to propel themselves. On success, you or a person you choose can jump up to 2 meters upwards or 4 meters forwards and land safely. The safe landing only applies to the height and distance from the jump itself. If “four meters forwards” is “off a cliff” or “in a dragon’s mouth,” you will not land safely.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target can jump up to 2/degree meters upwards or 4/degree meters forwards and land safely. You can bestow the effect on 1/degree target(s).

NAME: THIEF’S HAND
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Lights up an indigo magic circle on the palm of one hand, reaching out telekinetically to a target object. On success, you can pick up an object you can see and move it around in the air telekinetically at walking speed for 10 seconds, during which time the object is cloaked in a magic field that makes it invisible. This effect can be seen through with a Perception roll versus your spell check + 10.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can move 1/degree target(s) for (10 seconds/30 seconds/1 minute/3 minutes/10 minutes).

NAME: VACUUM SWELL
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering cylinder of indigo magic, glowing like silky bead curtains. On success, you create a cylindrical space 1 meter wide and 3 meters tall where gravity is nullified inside. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until you dispel it, which you can do at any point just by willing it away. Infamous for unintentionally revealing how dirty students’ floors are when the dust and grime starts floating.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The cylindrical space is 1/degree meter(s) wide and 3/degree meters tall, and lasts for (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: WALL OF FORCE
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: A swirl of indigo magic crackles around you, spinning several times until it launches forwards with a shuddering effect. On a success, you can target one creature or object with a blast of force that pushes it backwards as if rolling Athletics with your check to push it. A target must roll Endurance against your check to avoid getting thrown backwards. The perfect spell to push someone in a pool, in case you’re a jerk.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can push 1/degree distinct target(s). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can use a burst effect instead to target an entire area, affecting everything in a 1/degree meter wide area.

NAME: FLIPSTEP WALTZ
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Envelops a target in a distorted bubble of indigo magic energy that ripples strangely before it plunges inward. On success, one target, which can be yourself, must roll Agility against your spell check or be caught in inverted gravity, falling upwards. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until the target has gone more than 10 meters above where they originally were. When the effect ends, you can choose whether they fall suddenly or gradually.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s) for (1 minute/3 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/1 hour). On 4 or more degrees of success, you can have the spell take effect subtly, and you can activate it at any point during the duration. The target must roll Agility at the moment you activate it.

NAME: BREWBREAK
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Calls up a pale indigo glow from the tip of your wand as it feels out across the magic continuum for alchemical magic. On a success, you can tell if a target of your choice has a potion on them, and if they do, you can pick one to telekinetically control even if you can’t see it. You can choose whether to end the spell, break the potion, or move it off of their person. If you attempt to break the potion, they must roll Perception versus your spell check + 6 to catch the potion before you can break it, and if they fail, you can instantly destroy the potion. If you attempt to move the potion away from them, they must roll Perception versus your spell check to catch the potion, and if they fail, you can move the potion without them noticing, potentially to a place out of sight where you can take the potion.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can target 1/degree potion(s), whether from the same person or multiple.

NAME: LYRIC’S FLASH
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Flashes a peal of indigo magic from the tip of your wand towards a target. On success, you can choose one target you can see to roll Sleight of Hand or Endurance versus your spell check or be disarmed of whatever they have in their hands, launched from their hands in whatever direction you choose, including towards your hands. This spell is the reason it’s annoying when telekinetics fight over the TV remote.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: FEYTOUCH
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Summons a shimmering spectral glove over one hand with fey symbols down the length of it, allowing fine control of objects you see. On success, you can interact with something up to 5 meters away with a subtle magic that cannot be traced back to you. Any Sleight of Hand checks or other checks requiring fine precision with the motion take a +3 bonus. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until you choose to dispel it, and you cannot cast any other spells until the effect ends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can interact with objects up to 5/degree meters away and take a +3/degree bonus to Sleight of Hand or other precise checks.

NAME: QUICKSHIFT
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Releases a shower of goldenrod magic bolts from the tip of your wand that lance into the target. You can change up to 1 kilogram of nonmagical material into a slightly different material. The transformation lasts for 1 minute.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can change up to (1/2/5/10/20+) kilograms of material into a (slightly/noticeably/very/completely) different material for (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: LIFT
SUBJECT: TELEKINESIS
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds a target object you can see with a ring of vermillion light as telekinetic energies lift it off the ground. On success, one object you can see up to 1 kilogram begins rising at a slow pace for 1 minute or until you choose to end the effect. The target object continues to lift without your focus, so make sure you don't cast this on something outside and forget about it unless you want someone to get hit in the head some time later by a falling object.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can lift 1/degree target(s) up to (1/3/10/30/100/500/2000/5000/10,000) kilogram(s).

NAME: SPECTRAL ENGINEER
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a twinkling goldenrod magic veil that surrounds one nonmagical target object no larger than your hand. On success, you can change the object in a way that doesn’t require changing the material, such as changing a lock to fit a different key or changing the words on a page. The change lasts for 5 minutes, during which time you cannot cast this spell again. You cannot end the effect early. That’s still on the spell designer’s to-do list.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect a target no larger than (your hand/your head/your torso/yourself/twice your size).

NAME: SILVERED TOUCH
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch a small nonmagical object as part of casting this spell. On success, a thick silvery magic surrounds your fingertips, through which you can exert a small transmutational force. You can shrink or expand the object up to 20% of its original size. The size change lasts for 1 hour, during which time you cannot use this spell again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can shrink the object by up to (20/30/40/50/60/70/80/90/95/98/99/99.9/99.99)% of its original size or expand it by up to (20/50/100/150/200/300/400/500/1000/2000/5000)% of its original size.

NAME: STATE SHIFT
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a cloud of small, energetic, flitting goldenrod particles that settle on or in an object. On success, you can shift up to 5 kilograms of nonmagical substance from solid, liquid, or gas to another state. If you liquify a structural pillar, though, I mean, you get what’s coming to you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can shift up to 5/degree kilograms of nonmagical material.

NAME: AVALI’S SECRETS OF CREATION
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Launches a cloud of multicolored sparkling lights that consumes some amount of raw material. On success, you can consume one kilogram of raw material, although you can only skim objects and surfaces and cannot make any sizable marks or damages. Any time you have raw material consumed, you can cast this spell again without rolling (1AP) to turn that raw material into an object of your own creation no bigger than the total amount of all the raw materials you have collected, either made of jumbled raw materials or some simple material. You cannot construct with more than 10 kilograms of material at once. The constructed object is often kind of flimsy, so don’t try making a house like this.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can collect 1/degree kilogram(s) of raw nonmagical material.

NAME: BUILDER’S BOND
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a swirling goldenrod energy around your hand that hums with a soft magical sound that connects to an object. On success, the connection lets you ask one of the following questions of the object: • What lies on the other side? • What is this object made of? • How can I interact with this object? • Does this object conceal any secrets I am missing? • Who made this object? • When was this object last used? • How did this object get here? • At the GM’s discretion, you may ask another question not on this list but similar to the ones already there. The wall doesn’t know where you put your keys. Find them yourself.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s).

NAME: TOTAL SHIFT
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons thin ribbons of goldenrod magic that swirl in the air around a target object. On success, you can completely remake a nonmagical object up to 10 kilograms into anything that weighs the same amount, changing the shape, material, and complexity as you please. The transformation lasts for 10 minutes, which is just enough time for you to get attached to this cool new thing you made before it turns back into a cardboard box.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can remake 1/degree nonmagical object(s) up to 10/degree kilograms for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours).

NAME: THE MASTER’S TOUCH
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds an object in a cylinder of glowing goldenrod magic, symbols unique to you swirling through the surface. On a success, you permanently transform a nonmagical object up to 30 kilograms into anything that weighs the same amount. Thanks to this spell, a transmuter can make anything they want out of just one thing, so they don’t have to hoard things! I’m kidding, every transmuter is a hopeless hoarder.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can remake a nonmagical object up to (10/30/50/70/150/300/500/1000) kilograms.

NAME: MARWYN’S MOVEMENT
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch an inanimate object as part of casting this spell. On success, you animate the object, giving it one of the following properties: • Fast movement • Flight • Silent movement • Swimming • Burrowing movement • The object obeys roughly what you want it to do for 1 minute before reverting to an inanimate object. It needs a little nappy naptime after all that.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can bestow 1/degree property choice(s), whether to the same object or to multiple objects, for (1 minute/2 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/15 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: CREEPING DREAD
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Releases a black bolt that streaks through the air with the sound of metal tearing. On a success, the target must roll Agility versus your spell check or be struck by the bolt, which pools out over a hand-sized portion of their skin, and must Resist. Every hour, the size of the hex on their body doubles, and each time, they must Resist. If the hex covers their body completely, they must roll Endurance versus your spell check every 5 minutes, and on failure, they are petrified, turning into an obsidian statue. They are alive and semi-conscious in this state, but can only be returned to normal with extensive counterhexological magics. It’s nice if you want a scared-looking statue garden, though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect (1/2*) target(s).

NAME: FRAGMENTS OF THE PHILOSOPHER’S STONE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: The highest forms of transmutation magic flow from you as easily as breathing. On success, you enter the Catalyst state for 1 minute. While in this state, you can change the substance of any object with a single touch (1AP). You have 3 Catalyze points, and you can spend one (1AP) on any of the following at any time: • Cast Marwyn’s Movement as a Basic spell, but the change is permanent • Fabricate an object no bigger than yourself • Fabricate 10 objects no bigger than your arm • Cast The Master’s Touch as a Basic spell • For any option that mimics a spell, you can either roll for it or take 2 degrees of success. You stay in Catalyst state even if you spend your Catalyze points. When it ends, a flash of magic changes the air immediately around you into ozone, leaving a crackling and a bitter taste in the air.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Catalyst state lasts (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour), and you take 3/degree Catalyze points.

NAME: ONOMY’S PORTAL
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a wave of glowing goldenrod particles that cover a person-sized section of a nonmagical wall, floor, or ceiling. On a success, you create a door on the surface that allows easy passage through to the other side. The door can be dispelled at any time without an action. If you don’t specify what form the door takes, it takes the form of a human-sized cat flap. A legendary spell at Starfall Academy, for… some reason. Why a cat flap? Transmuters are strange people.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can specify (0/1+) target(s) who cannot pass through the door. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can create a hidden door that only you and anyone you specify when you cast the spell can see.

NAME: DISSOLVE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a froth of brilliant goldenrod lights that stream out from the tip of your wand and towards a target object. On success, one nonmagical object up to 1 kilogram is disintegrated by a destructive stream of magic. If the object is held by an unwilling creature, they can roll Sleight of Hand or Agility against your check to protect it. Keep in mind dissolving your bills doesn’t mean you don’t have to pay them.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose to either dissolve one object up to 1/degree kilogram(s), or dissolve 1/degree object(s) up to 1 kilogram.

NAME: AVALI’S FLYING FORGE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral goldenrod box made of shimmering magic energy. On success, you can turn 50 materials into 1 kilogram of a simple, common material in whatever form you like. A very popular spell that explains why transmuters always have so many things and so few materials.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can convert up to 50/degree materials to make 1/degree kilogram(s) per 50 materials spent.

NAME: MAGIC MASON
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Pours glowing goldenrod magic out in a flood from the tip of your wand into the surrounding space to interact with the terrain and reform it. On success, you can form new construction around you from the existing terrain, such as creating a wall, stairs, a ramp, etcetera, up to a 2-meter by 2-meter wall or equivalent. You cannot remove existing construction, only construct new ones, and they look convincingly part of any construction around, but someone can roll Investigate versus your spell check to determine that they are magically constructed. The new construction lasts indefinitely, although it is flimsy and can’t stand up to much damage, able to be broken with an Athletics check versus your spell check. The construction itself is mundane, which means that antimagic or dispelling effects will do nothing to it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can make an amount of construction equivalent to a wall of 2/degree meters per side.

NAME: WRECKER’S WRATH
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Pulls ambient magic together with a pale goldenrod glow to create a weapon. On success, you can form a rudimentary weapon out of solid materials, but the shape is unstable, and it breaks after 1 use or after 1 minute. You can choose whatever shape you want the weapon to be, but while you have it, you can roll Transmutation for any check to attack something or someone with it, and for any check that gives a penalty for having a poor weapon, this weapon always counts as a good weapon. People who know this spell tend to either have anger problems or be handy butch lesbians who love renovation projects.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The formed weapon lasts for (1/2/3/5/unlimited) use(s) in (1/3/10/15/30) minute(s).

NAME: PEEPHOLE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a halo of glowing magic energy about the size of your iris that settles into a surface to open a hole. On success, you can open a hole just big enough to look through in a surface no more than 5 centimeters thick. The hole remains for 1 minute, slowly shrinking shut at the end of the effect. If it closes on something, it continues trying to close but doesn’t push hard enough to cause damage, so if you’ve got your finger in it when it closes, it won’t hurt, it’ll just get your finger stuck and then you’ll look like a fool with your finger stuck in the wall.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can open a hole big enough to (look through/look through/reach through) in a surface no more than 5/degree centimeters thick.

NAME: SURFACE BOND
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering aura from the tip of your wand that pours backwards over your body, enveloping you in a pale golden light. On success, you have the Surface Bond status for 1 minute, which allows you to meld with the surface of objects, allowing you to hold onto an object with enough force that it would require breaking the object to separate you. While this is active, you can climb across surfaces, including ceilings, as easily as climbing a ladder.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Surface Bond state lasts for (1 minute/3 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/15 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can sublimate with a surface to move fluidly along it and reemerge elsewhere.

NAME: BARON'S MAGNET
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Lights up a gleaming charcoal-colored glow at the tip of your wand that resonates with a surface you can see, up to a quarter square meter. On success, you can make the surface magnetic north, magnetic south, or magnetically neutral, for 10 minutes. You can affect as many surfaces with this as you like, but the DC increases by 5 for each you currently have active, and if you fail the spell roll, you must Resist.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can cover (0.25/0.5/1/2/3/5/10+) square meters. The magnetic force can be stronger with more degrees of success.

NAME: HANDYMAN
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Releases a pair of gleaming goldenrod lights that spiral towards a target object you can see and start swirling around it. On success, the spell repairs any damage in the object over 5 minutes, during which time you cannot cast this spell again. Objects that are heavily damaged may not be able to be restored to their full condition, but the spell will do its best to restore it to some form of functionality.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target object is repaired in (10 minutes/5 minutes/1 minute/30 seconds/10 seconds/1 second).

NAME: SABOTEUR
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Pours a fluid-like magic out from the tip of your wand into an object, seeping into it and weathering its core. On success, you can sabotage up to 5 kilograms of target object, leaving its structural integrity weakened. The object remains intact, but it can only withstand half as much force as it could before it breaks. If you cast this spell on a different object, the previous object's structural integrity is restored, but if it broke in that time, it remains broken. In other words, if you like sitting in chairs, don't piss off a transmuter.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can sabotage up to 5/degree kilograms of target object, cutting its structural integrity to (50/25/10/5/2/1)%.

NAME: TENSOR TIGHTEN
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Fires a gleaming orb of magic into a surface you can see up to 1 square meter, rippling through it like waves. On success, you can make the surface more or less elastic, such as rendering a soft substance like cloth rigid or making a hard surface like a stone floor sag underfoot. The effect remains for one hour or until you will it away. It's hard to bore a transmuter, because they'll just make the floor a trampoline and bounce around.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect up to 1/degree square meter(s). The effect is more pronounced with more degrees of success, but on 3 or more degrees of success, you can make the object appear unchanged until physically interacted with.

NAME: SURFACE DETECTIVE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Sends a wave of goldenrod magic out from your fingertips into a surface, reacting to touches left on it. On success, you can learn when the surface was last touched, and you can either learn the previous time before that that it was touched, or you can learn one piece of information about who touched it last. If antimagic, Dispel, or a similar warding effect has been used on the surface, you cannot learn any information from before that point. You cannot use this spell on the same point again for another 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: After learning when the surface was last touched, you can learn either the previous time or a clue about one time you've learned (1/3+) time(s).

NAME: KALON'S ENTROPY
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Releases a peal of magic light with a low, dolorous tone that flows into an inorganic object within arm's reach up to 50 kilograms. On success, you can weather the object as though it has been neglected for 1 month, potentially advancing rust, cracks, erosion, or depending on the material, complete structural collapse. The object is aged according to how it would age in its current environmental conditions, so make sure to take the priceless artwork out from its cover first before using this on it, you monster.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can weather an object up to 50/degree kilograms by up to (1 month/6 months/2 years/10 years/25 years/100 years/250 years/1000 years).

NAME: SECRET STATE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: You must spend 1 minute touching the target to cast this spell, weaving secret magics into it. On success, you can choose up to 20 kilograms of material to take a Secret State, a second form it changes into under certain conditions. For example, a floor may become gaseous when a certain person walks over top, or a key may disguise as a mundane object when a command word is spoken. You can choose the altered state, the condition for changing, and the condition for changing back, if you wish there to be one. An object will return to normal after 10 minutes in its Secret State.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can cast this spell in (1 minute/10 seconds/no time at all). You can choose up to 20/degree kilograms of material to affect, and the target can stay in its Secret State up to (10 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/1 day/1 week).

NAME: AIR SNARE
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Weaves shimmering goldenrod magic through the air to thicken it. On success, you can make air in a space up to a 2-meter cube as dense as water, or you can make air in a space up to a half-meter cube as dense as a light wood, for 5 minutes. You cannot form a precise shape with this, but you can have it materialize at any point in sight, where it remains in place even if it's off the ground. If you trap somebody inside, they must roll Agility or Endurance versus your spell check to break free, with a +4 bonus if only part of their body is trapped inside. This air is breathable, but extremely uncomfortable.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can render air as dense as water in a cube up to 2/degree meters per side, as dense as light wood in a cube up to 0.5/degree meter(s) per side, or as dense as concrete in a cube up to (0/0/0.1/0.5/1+) meter(s) per side, for (5 minutes/30 minutes/2 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: GIGANTIFY
SUBJECT: TRANSMUTATION
DESCRIPTION: Fires a bolt of magic light that streaks towards one inorganic target, enveloping it in golden light as it expands. On success, the object expands as much as you like, up to a maximum size of 3 meters in any given axis, for up to 30 minutes. Finely tuned objects like electronics or magic items will likely continue to work, but possibly not as well at this scale.
