You can cast any Tansmutation magic on it that does not change its size as if it were its original size. This spell fails on anything that is already bigger than the maximum size. It'll take some higher-level casting to Gigantify your house.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can Gigantify a target up to a maximum size of 3/degree meters in any gizen axes for up to (30 minutes/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours/1 week).

NAME: SAFEGUARD
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Choose a spell when you cast this. One person you choose gains a shimmering light around their fingertips, and they gain a Safeguard against your chosen spell. If someone attempts to use the chosen spell against the person with Safeguard, it automatically fails, and the caster must Resist a condition. Safeguard is dispelled after protecting against a spell once, and you can only have one Safeguard active at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SCRY SHIELD
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Casts a crystalline field that settles over a person before becoming invisible. On success, the DC for someone to perform divination magic on the target increases by 5. The shield lasts for 12 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The DC for someone to perform divination magic on the target increases by 5/degree. The shield lasts for (12 hours/24 hours/3 days/1 week).

NAME: IMMUNITY
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Choose a Condition when you cast this. The target gains a shimmering crystalline field that settles over their shoulders like pauldrons for 5 minutes. While the spell is active, the target adds +4 to checks to Resist your chosen Condition. You can have multiple Immunities cast at once, but a given person can only have one at a time, and receiving a new one replaces their old one.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Immunity lasts for 5/degree minutes, giving a +(4/5+) bonus to checks to Resist the chosen Condition. On 4 or more degrees of success, you can choose a second Condition.

NAME: BARRIER
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a translucent crystalline barrier with the signature crystal lattice shape. On a success, you create a Barrier that blocks everything coming at it. Any spell that would have to pass through the Barrier must beat your spell check to break the Barrier, and unless it beats it with two or more degrees of success, the spell is dissolved in the process of breaking it. The Barrier lasts for 1 minute, and stays in one place in the air, which makes it kind of useless in a moving vehicle.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Barrier lasts for (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour). You can psychically move the Barrier (0/2/4/unlimited) times while it’s active (1AP).

NAME: NULLITY FIELD
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Create a shimmering crystalline circle of brilliant antimagic, searing away any magic effects that enter. The Nullity Field spreads over a 2-meter radius and glows with a pale white light underneath your feet and lasts for 30 minutes. Magic effects are negated inside the field, enchantments stop working, runes become inert drawings, wands cannot be used, and any magic that doesn’t specify an ability to be used in antimagic is nullified.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Nullity Field lasts for (30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours/unlimited time). You can specify (0/0/1+) target(s) whose magic is not nullified by the field, including yourself.

NAME: SEALING SIGIL
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a white crystal sigil marked with a glyph unique to you that blocks a door or small area. Anybody other than yourself who attempts to pass through must roll Analyze versus your spell check. Anyone who successfully passes through can choose to destroy the sigil or pass without trace. If the sigil is destroyed, you are alerted to it. The sigil lasts for 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The sigil lasts for (24 hours/3 days/1 week/unlimited time). You can specify (0/1+) other target(s) who can pass through without a check.

NAME: DIAMOND WALL
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a spectral wall that shimmers with the signature crystal lattice shape. On success, you create 5 square meters of wall from a spectral white material with the signature crystal lattice shape. The wall blocks anything physical, but light, sound, and magic can pass through. Anyone attempting to break it must use an appropriate spell or roll Athletics versus your check, with a -8 penalty if no weapon is used and a -4 penalty if a poor weapon is used. You can shape the wall however you like, but it cannot form a complete enclosure. The wall lasts 1 hour, but you can dismiss it early. You can only have one Diamond Wall active at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can create 5/degree square meters of wall, which lasts for (1/2/3/4/8/24) hour(s).

NAME: DISPEL
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Sends a charge of warding magic into a target to dispel a magic effect. Choose one magic effect when you cast this spell, and roll. If you beat the check of the spell that cast the effect, or a DC set by the GM, that magic effect ends. You can only use this spell once on a given magic effect.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: MIRROR PLATE
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a reflective spectral field that surrounds a target. On a success, the target is protected from physical projectiles and any spells directly targeting them, and if struck by one, can choose to redirect it in any direction, including back at the source. The effect lasts for 10 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant Mirror Plate to 1/degree target(s) for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours).

NAME: DIVINE AEGIS
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: The shield of the gods speaks through you in whispers. On success, you summon an Aegis, a shimmering, translucent magic barrier inscribed with countless runes, glyphs of an ancient language. For the next 6 hours, you are immune to anything you see coming and choose to be immune to, and if somebody casts a spell on you that you choose to be immune to, the spell is captured in the Aegis and you can cast it yourself without rolling a check for it (1AP), using the same check value that it was originally cast with. When the Aegis captures a spell in this way, it whispers into your ear what the spell is and, if you don’t already know, what it does. The Aegis will not protect you from criticism, though, so don’t get a big head.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant an Aegis to (0/1+) additional target(s).

NAME: FORTITUDE
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a soft spectral light that settles over you and up to 4 other people for 1 hour, granting a protective boon. On success, everyone protected by Fortitude can add +2 to all checks to evade or resist spell effects, including Resist checks.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant Fortitude to yourself and up to (4/5+) other people, granting a +(2/3+) bonus to checks to evade or resist spell effects.

NAME: ALARM
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a protective charm that scans the ley line disturbances in your area to search for danger. On success, you gain a small, floating silvery glyph that stays close to you and glows red if you are close to danger. The effect lasts for 1 hour.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours). When the Alarm detects danger, it will give you (0/1+) clue(s) about the nature of the danger.

NAME: BELAIR’S BASTION
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: A flicker of crystalline white magic that flares up in the signature crystal lattice over the caster. You can roll this spell in place of any check to avoid rolling Resist Wound in order to block an effect with a magic skin instead.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: REINFORCE
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on any inorganic object by placing your hands on the surface in a distinctive pattern with thumbs touching and fingers interlaced, enveloping the object with a web of white crystal lattice. On success, you can make an object up to 5 kilograms extremely difficult to break, requiring any check to break it to exceed your spell check + 10. This effect is permanent, but you can dispel the effect at any point by touching the object.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can Reinforce an object up to 5/degree kilograms.

NAME: RUNEBLOCK
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: A spell cast from a defensive wand posture, pressed sidelong against a rune, casting brilliant white magic light from either tip. On a success, you disable the target rune, for 30 seconds if your spell check is lower than the Intensity Rank of the rune, and for 10 minutes if your spell check is higher than the Intensity Rank.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: If you don’t beat the rune’s Intensity Rank, it is disabled for (30 seconds/1 minute/3 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour). If you do beat the rune’s Intensity Rank, it is disabled for (10 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: GUARDIAN ARM
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a flare of brilliant white magic light from one arm, lined with sigils unique to you. On success, you create a shield of spectral magic energy on your arm, weightless but big enough to completely cover yourself from the front. Any effect must beat your spell check to get through the shield. If an effect gets through with 3 or more degrees of success, the shield is shattered, but otherwise it lasts for 5 minutes. While the effect is active, you can retract and expand the shield at will (1AP). While the shield is retracted, its time does not run out, but it cannot last longer than an hour in total.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Your shield is big enough to cover (0/1+) additional target(s). If an effect penetrates your shield, you have a +(0/2+) bonus to checks to evade or resist it.

NAME: TITAN’S SILVER HAND
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral silver shell around one hand, pulsating like a heartbeat. On success, you obtain the Silver Hand for 10 minutes, blocking out latent powers. Any check made against you with an artifact must beat your spell check or automatically fail. Any runes or enchantments that would trigger when you touch them don’t take effect if you touch them with the Silver Hand. The Silver Hand is not dispelled by antimagic, but you cannot use it until you leave the antimagic area. If you touch a ley line outcropping with it, the Silver Hand explodes, and you must Resist, DC19. So don’t do that.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You give yourself and (0/0/1+) other target(s) the Silver Hand for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: MEYRI’S DAMPENER
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Fires a swirl of six glimmering white bolts at a target to suppress their magic. On success, a target must roll Agility or Concentration against your spell check or be unable to cast spells higher than Basic for the next 1 minute. On three or more degrees of failure on their check, they cannot cast any magic, and on five or more, they cannot use spells, potions, wands, artifacts, or make runes. Keep in mind this does not stop someone from hitting you over the head with a baseball bat.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s). The effect lasts for (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: FLICKERFAULT
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: Fires a bolt of crystalline white magic at an enchanted object or an artifact to disrupt it. On a success, the enchantment on an object is disabled for 1 minute, or if the target is an artifact attuned to somebody, they must roll for an artifact backfire. If the target object is in somebody’s possession, they can choose to roll Agility versus your spell check to evade the effect.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Disables an enchantment for (1 minute/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours), or if the target is an artifact attuned to somebody, they must roll for an artifact backfire with a -(0/1+) penalty.

NAME: UMBRA SILENTII
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: If somebody doesn’t know you’re there, you can cast this spell on them by holding either tip of your wand close to the back of their head, pouring out a shower of spectral white needles that drive undetectably into the entirety of the target’s back. On success, the target must roll Endurance versus your spell check or be Faded, taking a -1 to all spell checks. Every 24 hours afterwards, they must roll Endurance again, and on success, their penalty diminishes by 1, and on failure, their penalty worsens by 1. If their penalty reaches 0, the effect ends, and if it reaches -10, the hex completes, purging the magic from their system, and they can never cast a spell again. That’s kind of mean, isn’t it? They might have liked their magic.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a -(0/1+) penalty to their Endurance checks, and they start with a -(0/1+) penalty to their spell checks right away.

NAME: INFERNAL SEAL
SUBJECT: WARDING
DESCRIPTION: A spell cast without a wand by placing the fingertips together in an inverted pattern and speaking a demonic phrase that invokes legal protections under demonic contract languages. On success, you shroud yourself in a faint silvery halo for 30 minutes, during which time you are immune to all Demonology spells that don’t beat your spell check + 8, and any attempt to influence your emotions with demonic magic automatically fails. If a magic effect is demonically corrupted, you can touch it while you are in this state to revert it to normal for 1 minute. You can only do this to a given corrupted magic effect once for any given casting of this spell.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (30 minutes/1 hour/8 hours/24 hours), and you can revert corrupted magic for (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour). On 3 or more degrees of success, if somebody attempts to influence your emotions with demonic magic, you learn any demons they have contact with.

NAME: SECOND CHANCE
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Pulls the timestream back just a step to play something through again. When you see somebody make a check, you can cast this spell immediately. On a success, they must reroll the check. You cannot use this spell again for 1 hour afterwards, as the timestream sorts out its wrinkles from getting manhandled like that, you bully.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can give the target a bonus or penalty of ±(0/1+) to the check. You cannot use the spell again for (1 hour/30 minutes/20 minutes/10 minutes/5 minutes/1 minute).

NAME: ECHOES OF THE PAST
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Flicker back to a past point in time to glimpse the past of a certain place or object. Pick a precise point in time when you cast this spell. You can gain a 5-minute long glimpse at a time close to the target time, although the further back you go, the less precise the timing is. As a warning, the past is often not as rosy as in your memories, so you might be disappointed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can gain 1/degree 5-minute glimpses from around the time you picked, although unless you have 4 or more degrees of success, you won’t know exactly when each glimpse was from.

NAME: SLOW
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Drags somebody’s timestream to a near-standstill. Roll versus a target’s Concentration. On a success, the target moves in slow motion, their speed halved for one minute in real time. A target that uses AP in Action has their AP costs doubled during the effect. A target that gives AP in Action gives double the AP on actions. You can use it on yourself if you want to fast-forward through that boring lecture you’ve got on Fridays.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target is slowed by (2/3+)x.

NAME: FREEZE
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Releases a burst of magic energy from the tip of your wand that anchors the current moment in the timstream with a shimmering gold effect that settles in the air. On success, time is frozen for 10 seconds, during which time you can move and act freely. If used in Action, take 1AP that you can use without anyone else being able to act. Unspent AP are lost when you end the spell effect.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You freeze time for (10 seconds/20 seconds/30 seconds/1 minute/2 minutes/5 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour). If used in Action, take (1/2/3/4/5/6)AP of Freeze time.

NAME: REVERT
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Turn back the hands of time. For each degree of success, you can revert a nonmagical object up to 10 kilograms back by 5 minutes, negating everything that happened to it in the past 5 minutes. Cannot be used on a creature. I know you got into chronomancy to turn back your bad decisions, but you need a higher level spell for that.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can revert 10/degree kilograms by (5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours/1 week/1 month/6 months/1 year).

NAME: COUNTERFACTUAL
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Slips you through a timestream gap and into an alternate reality. On success, you enter a parallel reality for 30 seconds, at the end of which everything will be reverted back to the point in time you cast the spell, but you keep any memories and information you’ve learned, along with any non-Wound Conditions. This spell makes it hard to get under a chronomancer’s skin, because they probably took out their frustration by punching you in the face in a parallel reality.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The parallel reality lasts for (30 seconds/1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/3 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: DESTINY’S TOUCH
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: When somebody rolls for a check, you can cast this spell to give them the opportunity to retroactively use any ability that must be declared before the roll. Designed by a very forgetful old wizard.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: BETWEEN THE CLOCK HANDS
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: A spectral version of yourself guides you to dive into the timestream. On a success, choose a point in the past or future within 24 hours. You can spend up to 15 minutes living in that point in time as though it is your own, although it is only a reflection—if you change the past, it won’t affect the present, and if you see the future, it may set you on a path that puts you towards a different future.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can travel to a point in the past or future up to (24 hours/3 days/1 week/2 weeks/1 month/3 months/6 months/1 year/10 years/100 years).

NAME: GLIMPSE
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Grants you a small and vague look into the future. On success, you gain a brief vision of the future. You can take a +1 bonus to one check relating to your vision, at the GM’s discretion, but on failure, your vision is misleading and gives you a -2 to a check at the GM’s discretion. You cannot use this ability again until the situation has passed or until you’ve changed the future enough that it won’t come to pass. Casinos have banned this spell, but to be fair, they’ve also just banned chronomancers.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +1/degree bonus to a check relating to your vision.

NAME: THE WILL OF THE COSMOS
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: The arms of the Milky Way turn like a clock, and the clocks are your domain. On a success, you can bring up to 4 other people with you back in time to the start of the current day with all the knowledge and memories they currently have. However, one person traveling back in time with you, including potentially yourself, must volunteer their heart to the cosmos. They will lose all their memories of one person, chosen at the GM’s discretion.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can revert time to (the start of the day/the start of yesterday/1 week ago/2 weeks ago/1 month ago/6 months ago/1 year ago/4 years ago/10 years ago).

NAME: TEMPORAL VOID
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: The endless emptiness of time overwhelms mortal souls. You can unleash twisting black bolts that will ensnare a creature and drag it into the timestream to face the full weight of eternity. Roll versus a target’s Comprehend. On a success, they must Resist Despair.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a -(0/2+) penalty to their Resist Despair check.

NAME: FABELYN’S PEN OF FATE
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons the legendary chronomancer’s Pen to rewrite your own past. On success, you can jump one minute into the past, reverting everything that happened to the world around you since then. You are unchanged from when you cast the spell, so you retain your memories and knowledge, but also any Conditions you have. Fabelyn attempted to turn this popular spell into a brand and sell branded literal pens, but they were a flop that haunted her until her death.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can jump up to (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours) into the past.

NAME: COSMIC ANCHOR
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Anchors you to one point in time with a brassy golden band that settles over your arms and chest with a spectral clock face. On success, you gain two Anchor Points, which you can spend to revert time back to the moment you chose. You return to your chosen point in time at a point you choose or automatically after 10 minutes, but you can also choose to end the spell early even with Anchor Points remaining.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You gain 2/degree Anchor Point(s). You revert to the Anchor Point automatically after (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours).

NAME: SILVER TIMESTREAM
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a pale shimmering silver light that settles over the edges of your vision as you form a different timestream. On success, you enter a different timestream, which you can choose to go at half or double speed relative to the world around you, for 1 minute in your time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The timestream is slowed or sped up by a factor of (2/3+), and lasts for 1/degree minute(s) in your time.

NAME: MARWYN’S MEDDLING HAND
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering spectral golden aura around your off hand that pulls you backwards through the timestream. On success, you can move backwards in time by 30 minutes and spend 5 minutes there before reverting back to your regular time, with any changes you performed in the timestream left as they were. The timestream will reshape itself to adjust to the changes you made. Possibly the most dangerous spell there is, because restoration won’t help if you time-paradox yourself away.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can move backwards in time by up to (30 minutes/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours/1 week/1 month) and spend 5/degree minute(s) in that time. You can bring up to (0/0/1/1/2/2/3+) other target(s) with you.

NAME: TIMESKIPPER
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell any time you would make an Athletics or Agility check to move quickly to roll this spell instead, moving your wand through a careful set of gestures and enrobing yourself in an enchantment to move more quickly through the timestream. Popular among impatient people, otherwise known as “all chronomancers ever.”
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: REDMARE’S TIMEBOLT
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral screw-like shape that only you can see and appears to twist the timestream around it. On success, you can place a Timebolt in the current moment, and at any point within the next 24 hours, you can cast this spell again without rolling to return to the point in time when you placed the Timebolt for 10 seconds. Any changes you make to the timestream while reverted to the Timebolt point will remain in the timestream, and the timestream will adjust to accommodate. You cannot cast this spell again until the Timebolt has been used or runs out after 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can return to the temporal position of the Timebolt for (10 seconds/1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour). You can use the Timebolt (1/1/1/2/2/2/3/3/3/4+) time(s).

NAME: SLACKTIME
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: A magical technique used to subtly manipulate the timestream over a long, steady period. You can use this spell at the end of a Downtime block that required a roll and did not have an active scenario. On success, you can reroll the check, but you must take the new roll.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: On 3 or more degrees of success, you can reroll (1/1/1/1/2/2/3) time(s) and choose which roll to keep.

NAME: TEMPORAL BATTERY
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell by taking an hour, and at the end you can choose whether to roll or to take one degree of success. On success, a Temporal Battery appears around your wrist, a brassy ring of dull magic light. Any time you have a Temporal Battery, you can spend one to perform a ritual cast in one minute instead of one hour, as the sealed-up time distortion locked into the battery flashes out and accelerates the process. Temporal Batteries last indefinitely, but you cannot cast this spell again until you’ve spent the ones you have.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You take 1/degree Temporal Battery(ies).

NAME: CONDUCTOR’S BATON
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering spectral shelf of magic flares that rise and dance at the movement of your wand like a spectral orchestra, directing a target’s future. On success, a target you can see must roll Chronomancy versus your spell check to command enough control over their own future or allow you to write catastrophe into their fate. For each degree of failure on their check, you can write three Orchestrations into their future, and at some point over the next week, they will take a Condition stack for each one, as your Orchestration unfolds to cause them harm. If the target is not a PC, you can decide when you cast this spell what the Downing effect looks like if an Orchestration unfolding puts them at 0 Resolve. If somebody is under the effect of this spell, another person can roll Chronomancy on them versus your spell check + 4, discovering the spell effect on them and how many Orchestrations remain on success, and on two or more degrees of success, they can trace the spell back to you.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: ARIIN’S ETERNAL SIGHT
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: A volatile spell that creates an ornate gateway that ripples with brassy magic, a portal to the distant past. On success, you create a gateway that leads to a point in time of your choice from the last 5 years, where you can stay for 1 hour. The vision of the past that you see is only a simulation, and though it will react to your presence and your actions, the timestream will not be changed by anything you do in the past. The gateway allows anybody to pass through without a check once created, and lasts for 1 minute and cannot be closed early. This spell was created in collaboration between Starfall founder Ariin and legendary spell designer Harriett Cloudless, but Cloudless doesn’t like attention and readily elected to have her name not on the spell.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can go to any point in the past (5/10/20/30/50/100/200/500/1000) years and stay for up to (1 hour/8 hours/24 hours/1 week/1 month/6 months/1 year). On 4 or more degrees of success, you can choose when you cast the spell that changes you leave in the past will remain in the timestream.

NAME: LAST DANCE OF THE CELESTIALS
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: The highest expression of ancient chronomantic powers, you can spend 24 hours casting this spell, carefully crafting a magic heart that pulsates and gleams like a miniature star, swirling with its own timestream. On success, you pin the current moment to a moment at some point over the next month, creating a time loop. When you cast this spell, you must specify some condition for the loop to end. If there is already a time loop active somewhere, instead of creating a time loop, this spell tells you the details of the active time loop. You can cast this spell on someone who has this spell active and, if your check beats theirs, you can break their time loop. While you have this spell active, every time time reaches its loop point, you must Resist, DC10, but the DC increases by 2 with every loop.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can set the loop to repeat at some point in the next (month/3 months/6 months/year/2 years/4 years/10 years).

NAME: FABELYN’S CACHE
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a mark of glowing chronomantic energy somewhere on your body that reflects the action stored into it. On success, you can create a Cache, a glowing symbol of a stored action in time, on your body. Make any roll you like, saving the results. Your Caches last for 24 hours, during which time, if you ever have to make a check that you have stored in a Cache, you can choose to use that saved roll instead, having performed the action in advance and pulling it out of the time cache and into the present moment. Any results of the roll, such as backfires or improvement rolls, are processed upon using the Cache, and any Caches that disappear unspent after 24 hours do nothing. You cannot cast this spell if you already have active Caches.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain up to 1/degree Cache(s).

NAME: CHRONOMANCER’S INSTINCT
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Flares a glimpse of danger to come, bending time to get more opportunity to react. You can cast this spell when you would roll for Action, taking 1AP on success.

NAME: DA CAPO
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a pair of swirling magic lights that link a person’s mental state to their past. On success, you create one Capo on a target, a magic symbol that glows on their body before disappearing, storing their current mental and emotional state. At any point while you have a Capo on a target, you can expend it to force them to roll Concentration versus your spell check or return to the emotional state they were in at the time it was created, bringing up all the feelings and thoughts they had at that moment, as well as any memories they had at that moment. If the target had a stack of any Condition when the Capo was created, you can choose for them to take a stack of that Condition if they fail their roll. A Condition stack taken this way lasts for 10 minutes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can create 1/degree Capo(s), whether on one target or on multiple. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can create a Capo invisibly, without the target noticing.

NAME: TIMELESS SEER
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a droplet of pure magic from the tip of your wand that falls onto an object, spilling outwards into a magic circle that turns like the face of a clock. You can cast this spell on an inorganic object, and on success, you can learn everything that happened to it over the last 24 hours, including being able to see and hear murkily from its location over that time frame. Excessive use can make you bond a little too closely with the target object, which gets awkward when it’s just some random door or something and you feel like you had a deep, meaningful experience with it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can see everything that’s happened to and around the object over the last (24 hours/3 days/1 week/2 weeks/1 month/3 months/6 months/1 year/3 years/10 years/100 years).

NAME: FABELYN’S INTERLUDE
SUBJECT: CHRONOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Draws a portal in the air that peers through the timestream, reflecting a spectral version of yourself on the other side like a haunted mirror. On success, you can cast 1 spell in the current area that takes place at a time of your choosing from the last 24 hours, which can potentially change the past and alter the present. Anybody who would have to roll as a result of your spell makes their rolls with any stats and effects they had at the time the spell was cast. Chronomancers think they’re clever using this spell to alter their exam results after the fact, not realizing that the professors let it happen because it makes really good chronomancers out of them.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can cast 1/degree spell(s) at any point(s) of your choosing from the last (24 hours/3 days/1 week/2 weeks).

NAME: DREAM PORTENT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell before going to sleep. If you get at least most of a full night of sleep, you can roll on waking up. On success, you take 2 Foresight points. At any point throughout the day, when someone is going to make a check, you can choose to have had a vision about that topic in your dreams, and add as many of your Foresight points to the roll as you like. This spell is known for making a fool of people who forget to cast it the night before and think their regular dreams are visions.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You take 2/degree Foresight points.

NAME: SCRY
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Opens a shimmering magic portal in the shape of a magic mirror that shows you what you want to see. When you cast this spell, name a person, object, or place, and roll. On a success, the portal opens showing you what you asked for, and stays open for 30 seconds. The target must roll Perception versus your spell check + 5, and on one degree of success, they can sense they’re being scried on, and on two or more degrees of success, they can detect you scrying on them. If you fail the spell roll, the target will know someone attempted to scry on them, but will not be able to determine who did it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You gain 1/degree 30-second Scry blocks, which you can use to Scry on the same target for longer or switch at the end of 30 seconds to view a different target. Each new target creature can roll Perception against your Scry.

NAME: DISTANT SIGHT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a shimmering, translucent dragon’s eye that watches over an area. On a success, you create a Diviner’s Eye that watches over a point and that only you can see. Any time you are able to use magic, you can shift your vision without a check to see through the Diviner’s Eye. The Diviner’s Eye will last until dispelled, but you can only have one at a time. Casting another one will make the first one disappear. The Diviner’s Eye can only be found by people other than you with a Perception check of DC30 or your spell check, whichever is higher.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can keep (0/1+) previous Diviner’s Eye(s) that you’ve created when you cast this spell. You can choose which ones, and you can see through any of them at any point.

NAME: HEARTSIGHT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: A feared and reviled hex that lays a person bare. On a success, the target must roll Deception versus your spell check + 5. For each degree of failure on their check, you can spend 30 seconds hearing their thoughts in your own head. You will only hear their surfacemost thoughts, but you can speak to them to guide certain thoughts to the surface. Ironically, probably nobody is more scared of this hex than people who use hexes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s). You can listen to multiple people’s thoughts like multiple voices, where you can only pay active attention to one at a time but something from another person’s thoughts might catch your interest.

NAME: VISIONS
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Touch an object as part of casting this spell. On success, choose one of the following for the GM to tell you one thing about: • Its past • Its purpose • Its composition • Who owns it • Who last had it • What might happen to it • At the GM’s discretion, you can ask another question in a similar vein. You can only use this spell once on any given object.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s).

NAME: GREATER INSIGHT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Divinatory insight flows through your mind helping sift truth from lie. On success, a faint golden haze lingers at the edges of your vision and will flare up in your vision when you hear somebody tell a lie for the next 1 minute. It will only detect statements that are directly untrue, so lies of omission, creatively stating the truth, and other deceptive techniques can still get by you. A faint golden color appears around the edge of your irises while this spell is active, but only someone paying close attention would notice, and other than that, the spell gives no indications that you have cast it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect remains active for (1 minute/5 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours). Take a +(0/1+) bonus to Read Person checks to determine if someone is lying while this effect is active.

NAME: AUGURY
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You perform a ritual unique to you and the way your divination magic flows to read the flow of different futures. On success, you can present the GM one hypothetical action you could take, and the GM will respond with a short answer describing what is likely to happen if you take that action.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can present 1/degree hypothetical action(s).

NAME: ALL LAID BARE BENEATH THE STARS
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Rips your consciousness from your own form to glimpse something in reality from the all-seeing eyes of the universe. Choose a person you know of when you cast this spell. On success, the universe grants you deep, immutable insight on them. For the next week, you have a +8 on all checks against them, they automatically fail on all Deception or Stealth checks against you, and the GM will give you one piece of information on them that nobody else knows. In general, if they try to do something that would otherwise surprise you, the GM will give you advance warning of it. Students using this on professors to get an edge in exams was almost banned, before the professors realized it was making legendary diviners of their students.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: HEAVENLY GUIDANCE
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You cast your eyes and ears to the stars and gather insight on the current situation. On success, the GM will tell you one thing you may be missing about the current situation or give you a small piece of information to help you figure out what to do next.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You gain 1/degree piece(s) of information. Take a +(0/1+) to your next check to use this information.

NAME: WARNING
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a sparkling magic cloud that shifts to show you what you’re facing. On success, take three Warnings, rolling 2d10 once for each and saving the result as your Warning. Any checks that are made against you and up to 4 people you specify, from people other than yourself or those you specify, will pull from your Warnings in order, instead of rolling a 2d10, until the list of Warnings is exhausted.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take 3/degree Warning(s).

NAME: CRYSTAL BALL
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a swirling gaseous orb that waits for a command. On a success, the Crystal Ball appears and awaits your instruction. If you speak the name of a person, a similar Crystal Ball will appear at that person’s location, creating a two-way channel where you can see and speak to each other. Anybody who doesn’t want to be contacted via Crystal Ball must roll Stealth or Hide Object versus your spell check + 4. At any time while the Crystal Ball is active, you can end the connection and speak somebody else’s name to redirect it to them. The Crystal Ball lasts for 1 minute.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Crystal Ball lasts for (1 minute/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: COSMIC TRACES
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Tracks down the spectral traces left on an object and lights them up, surrounding the object in illusory golden flames where you can read its past. On success, you can ask the GM one question about its past. The question must be simple and straightforward, and the GM may ask you to change your question if you ask one that’s too large or complex.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s) about the object.

NAME: STAR-STUDDED SIGHT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a thin pallor of shimmering pale-gold light over the corners of your vision that glows like stars over everything you see. On success, you can see an interesting event that has happened in the space you are in or that will happen. You do not necessarily know when this vision is from, but you may be able to discern clues from within the vision to tell.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +(0/2+) bonus to checks performed on the vision, such as Perception checks to notice fine details or Comprehend checks to understand the context of it.

NAME: LILIBEL’S LITTLE PROMISE
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You can use this spell when you wake up after a night of rest or at the end of any Downtime block. You can choose to roll it or just to take one degree of success. On success, you have a vision of one thing that’s going to happen over the day to come.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You have 1/degree vision(s) of the day to come.

NAME: HEAVEN’S LENS
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral porthole in the air with an appearance that’s unique to you and lets you see the past. On success, you can peer through into the past of whatever space you set up the porthole to look at, letting you ask the GM one question about that space from the past 24 hours. The porthole remains in the space it was used, shimmering faintly, for 24 hours after casting this spell.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s) from the past (1/2/5/7/14/30/60/180) day(s).

NAME: HALO SIGHT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell anytime you would have to roll Perception to detect a person, and roll this spell instead against the same DC, creating a flare of pale blue light in a ring around your irises as your magic shows you glimpses of anyone around.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: CRYSTAL INSIGHT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a gleam like diamond dust around your eyes, your pupils turning into tall, thin slits for a second to take in a target. Roll versus a target’s Concentration. On success, you can learn one piece of information about them. If the target knows what you are doing, they can choose to roll Deception instead of Concentration, in which case, if they succeed, you instead learn a false piece of information about them. Sometimes it returns completely useless information, but diviners love completely useless information.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree piece(s) of information.

NAME: VALEY’S MAGIC EAR
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a thin wreath of light blue and pale violet magic sparks that shimmer like tiny gemstones, swirling slowly around your neck and head. On success, you can hear sounds up to 10 meters away as clearly as if you were standing directly next to them, by focusing your attention on that point. You cannot use this spell to hear anything inside an enclosed area, but as long as there is an unobstructed path less than 10 meters long to the target point, you can listen in.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can hear sounds at a point up to (10/20/50/100/200/500) meters away, so long as the geometry permits within that distance.

NAME: FIRST IMPRESSIONS
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell upon meeting someone for the first time in at least 30 days, or if it is your first time meeting someone altogether. On success, you learn one piece of nonsecret information about them. Keep in mind people typically find it weird when you first meet them and you tell them their mother’s maiden name.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree piece(s) of nonsecret information about the target, or you can forgo 3 pieces of nonsecret information to learn 1 piece of secret information.

NAME: DOOR GUARD
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on any doorway, a definition which can be a little flexible, including things like archways, the mouth of a cave, a trapdoor, a window, or any mundane boundary between two different spaces. On success, choose whether to see the past or the future. If you choose the past, then you learn the last time somebody passed through that doorway, as well as who it was and which direction they were going. If you choose the future, you instead see who will be the next person to pass through if things remain as they are, although your actions may alter the course of the future. When you cast this spell, you can choose to ignore the passage of anybody you choose, including yourself, so it won’t just tell you that the last person who went through it was, in fact, you, two seconds ago.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn the past/next 1/degree creature(s) who have passed through or will pass through the doorway.

NAME: STAR SANCTUARY
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering veil of magic light like stars that settle as a dreamy canopy over a space. On success, you create a Star Sanctuary, a space imbued with divination magics. Any time you cast a Divination spell inside your Star Sanctuary, you can choose to spend an hour casting it, including as a ritual, to add an extra degree of success. Take one additional bonus: • Divination you cast from your Star Sanctuary cannot be traced to you • Advanced Divination spells cast in your Star Sanctuary cost 250 materials • Divination spells cast with the Star Sanctuary bonus do not backfire (except for hexes) • You can take the Star Sanctuary bonus on Divination artifacts • When you cast a spell with the Star Sanctuary bonus, you can take the results of the Augury spell with 1 degree of success • Your Star Sanctuary lasts indefinitely, but any time you cast a new one, it replaces the old one.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take 1/degree additional bonus(es).

NAME: CELESTIAL CONSULT
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell any time you are able to take a Downtime option to create a swirl of hazy visions around you, seeing possible futures. On success, you can make a roll associated with a Downtime option and decide, based on the roll, whether you want to pick that option or not. If you pick that option, you must take the selected roll. Sometimes this spell just tells you everything will go badly and you should just go take a nap instead, though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can roll 1/degree different Downtime options before deciding which to pick.

NAME: HEAVEN’S GAZE
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering magic ring on the ground below you, expanding outward and glowing in pale blue. On a success, you learn the general layout of the space around you, such as the plan of a building you are in, the shape of a cave you are in, or the lay of the land in a wild space around you, and you can ask one more specific question about it from the GM. The GM may ask you to change your question if it is too broad or doesn’t make sense. A beloved spell by diviners, who often get lost inside their own homes.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree further specific question(s) about the area.

NAME: SAPHI’S SPECTRAL SECRETS
SUBJECT: DIVINATION
DESCRIPTION: Summons a small spectral figure that looks like a little fairy figure and twinkles like a bell as it flits around a magic phenomenon studying it. When you can touch a place where a spell was either cast recently or left traces that are still evident, you can cast this spell and roll either DC18 or against the check of the magic you are casting this spell on, at the GM’s discretion. On success, you can learn one of the following: • Who cast this? • What spell was this? • When was this spell cast? • At the GM’s discretion, you can ask any similar question not on this list.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s).

NAME: SLEEP
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Releases a shower of pale pink particles that settle over a person. On success, you can put one creature within arm’s reach of you to sleep for 5 minutes or until awoken. An unwilling target can roll Willpower or Endurance versus your spell check to stay awake.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can put 1/degree target(s) to sleep for (5 minutes/15 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours).

NAME: HYPNOS’ LENS
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a sleeping target you can see, summoning a shimmering pink ring through which you can see glimpses of the dream world. On success, you can glean one thing about what they’re dreaming. You cannot use this spell on the same person until they’ve woken up and have gone to sleep again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree piece(s) of information about the target’s dreams.

NAME: DREAM WHISPERS
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Releases a thin ribbon of pink magic from the tip of your wand that carries a dream and snakes towards a target. You can cast this spell on a sleeping target you can see, as long as there exists an unobstructed path, however small, between you and the target. On success, you get a brief glimpse of the target’s dream, and you can make one change to the dream. You can give someone nightmares like this, but it’s kinda rude, don’t you think?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can change 1/degree aspect(s) of the dream.

NAME: DREAM DUST
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Releases a small dusting of shimmery pink dust that will settle over a sleeping person and calm their dreams. If they are having a nightmare, it will be turned into a gentle, pleasant dream. If somebody else is interfering with their dream via hypnomancy, the Dream Dust will end that effect. If you snort the dust, it gives you the trippiest dreams you’ve ever had, so please stop doing that.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: DREAMWORLD
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a hypnomantic dreamscape, an alternate magic space under your command. On success, you create a Dreamscape, a persistent dream world. Specify one detail you want about the dream, and you can bring one sleeping target you can see into your Dreamscape. Any time you sleep, you can choose to enter your Dreamscape, where you are lucid and can cast magic. You can choose to give someone in your dreamscape lucidity, or they can roll Comprehend versus your spell check to realize they’re in a dream. If you cast this spell while you already have a Dreamscape, you can change the Dreamscape.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can change 1/degree aspect(s) of the Dreamscape, and bring (1/2*) sleeping target(s) you can see into your Dreamscape.

NAME: DREAMWALK
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a sleeping target as part of casting this spell. On success, you enter their dream for 10 minutes and can experience it exactly as they’re experiencing it. You can appear in the dream however you like, including being invisible. While inside the dream, you can cast any hypnomancy spell as if you are targeting the dreamer. You should be warned that you run a decent risk of finding out someone’s fetishes this way.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can spend (10 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/as long as you like) in the target’s dream. Take a +(0/1+) bonus to Hypnomancy checks against the dreamer.

NAME: TRANCE
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering pink magic field that settles like a blanket over you and puts you into a deep trance. While in this trance, you are effectively asleep while still being fully aware of the world around you, and you can choose to wake up at any moment. You can gain the benefit of a full night of sleep with 6 hours of sleep.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can gain the benefit of a full night of sleep with (6/5/4/3/2) hours of sleep.

NAME: WAKING NIGHTMARE
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can bring to life the most vivid, visceral fears of a person. Touch a sleeping target as part of casting this spell, and on success, you can implant two Nightmare Seeds into the person. While they’re awake, you can activate any Nightmare Seed at any time to flood their senses with the illusion that some terrible nightmare of theirs is real. They must Resist Fear, with a -4 to the check if you know beforehand what their fears are. Nightmare Seeds never disappear, and a person has no way to determine if they’re inflicted with one.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You inflict 2/degree Nightmare Seeds.

NAME: VYLA’S DREAM PEARL
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a spectral glowing pink pearl that allows people to share dreams. On success, you create two pearls marked with a symbol unique to you. Anyone who holds one of the pearls when going to sleep will experience a shared lucid dream with anybody holding a matching pearl. While you are in the dream, you can cast hypnomancy spells on anyone else in the dream. Vyla was mostly trying to make something pretty when she made this spell, but it turned out to be useful too.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You create (2/3+) pearls.

NAME: MASTER OF SWEET OBLIVION
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You become a hypnomantic avatar, the magic turning you into a dreamy vision. On success, you become incorporeal for 1 minute, and you can touch someone (1AP) to force them to make a Willpower check against your spell check or fall asleep. Anybody you put to sleep like this, or anybody you touch who already is asleep, is whisked into a dream of your own creation. You control everything that happens in the dream, and once every 30 seconds, you can use it to force anyone in your dream to Resist any non-Wound condition. On the spell ending, you return to your corporeal form and everyone you put to sleep during the spell must make a Willpower check versus your spell check or stay asleep for 4 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect is active for (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: HYPNOS’ NET
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a net woven of shimmering pink thread to ensnare a sleeping person. On success, the target cannot be woken up for 2 hours, and will be trapped inside their current dream. You cannot use this spell again until they wake up.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target cannot be woken up for 2/degree hours.

NAME: SLUMBERING SNARE
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: While you are in a lucid dreaming state or a Trance, you can cast this spell to attempt to pull someone into your dream. On success, you gain a Dream Snare, a shimmering pink sphere that only exists in the dreamscape. You can spend a Dream Snare by touching it and naming a person. They must roll Willpower or Hypnomancy versus your check or be pulled into your dream, where they are lucid and conscious in your dream and trapped there until you let them go or they wake up. This spell ends when you wake up or when you use your last Dream Snare.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You gain 1/degree Dream Snare(s).

NAME: DREAMER’S EYE
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Releases a pale pink shimmering light that billows outward, covering the area around you. On success, you can mark the current area. Any time you go to sleep, you can choose to have a lucid dream in a replica of any area you’ve marked this way, allowing you to interact with the space as it was when you cast this spell in it. The recreation of the space is accurate even of things you didn’t notice or couldn’t see, but it is only a simulation and doesn’t change anything in real life, and the people in the dream space won’t necessarily react like they would in reality.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +(0/1+) to checks to further study the area in your dream. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can choose to cast the spell subtly.

NAME: VYLA’S ROOM
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this on a person before they sleep, including yourself, touching their forehead with your fingers in a triangle and whispering an incantation. On success, you can implant a Dream Room into the person prepared for them to train and learn in the next time they sleep. Name an Ability when you cast this spell. When the target next sleeps for a full night, they can make an improvement roll in the given ability. You can only have one Dream Room active at a time, and after it is used, it fades from the person. A target cannot benefit from the Dream Room if the duration of their sleep is reduced, even if it counts as a full night of rest.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a +(0/1+) bonus to their improvement roll.

NAME: DREAMERS’ THREAD
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell without rolling, creating a shimmering pink thread that ties around your ring finger and that of a willing target before vanishing. You and the target are now Dream Linked, and you can choose, at any time when going to sleep, to try to share a dream with anybody you are Dream Linked to. If you do, they will be aware of it, and if they choose to share a dream as well, then you enter the same dream space. You can have as many Dream Links at once as you like, but either party involved in the link can end it at any time by just willing it away.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SARINA’S DREAM MEMORY
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a shower of faint pink sparkles like a fine dust that lights up with visions of dreams. On success, you can learn the identity of the last person to have slept in the space you are in, and you learn one piece of information either about them or what they dreamed, your choice. You can only cast this spell once in a given place until someone has slept there again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree piece(s) of information about the last person to have slept in the space you are in or about their dreams.

NAME: DREAMLINGER
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmering trace on a surface in gentle pink magics that glow brighter and brighter until they flicker out, turning invisible. On a success, you can plant a dream in that space, so that whoever goes to sleep there next will experience that dream. You can describe the dream you want them to have or you can set it up so that they will enter your dream, be that a dreamscape or any dream you are in when they go to sleep there. Regardless of what kind of dream you set up, anyone who goes to sleep there must roll Willpower versus your spell check + 6, or just versus your spell check if they know the effect is there, or enter the dream you set up.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +(0/1+) bonus against any hypnomancy spells cast against a target having a dream caused by this spell.

NAME: WEB OF SWEET REPOSE
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral glowing pink net that settles over a person, shimmering over their body before it vanishes. On success, you give one target a Dream Web that lasts for 24 hours. If anybody you don’t specify as immune casts hypnomancy on a target with your Dream Web and they don’t roll higher than your spell check, then their magic fails and you are alerted to it, and you can choose whether they must Resist or if they must roll Willpower versus your check on this spell or be put to sleep instantly and, if you have a dreamscape or are dreaming when this happens, trapped inside your dream for 1 hour or until physically woken up on the outside world.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant 1/degree target(s) a Dream Web.

NAME: DREAMER’S BALLAD
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell anytime you are in a shared dream with somebody else, over the course of a full night of sleep. Roll against the target’s Comprehend. On success, you can take the results of any Charm skill of your choice on that person, as sweet hypnomantic magic links the two of you closer and makes them more amenable to your charm. If the target was not lucid in the dream, their thoughts and feelings will still be influenced, but they will not have any recollection of the dream and may not understand why they feel the way they do.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take the results of any Charm check with 1/degree degrees of success.

NAME: SARINA’S SEED OF SLEEP
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Emits a soft pink light from the tip of your wand that drifts soundlessly towards a target, melding with the back of their neck. Roll against a target’s Perception. On a failure, they are implanted with a Sleep Seed that remains there for 24 hours without them knowing it. If a target has been implanted with a Sleep Seed for at least 1 hour, you can activate it from anywhere to force them to fall asleep instantly, getting pulled into your dream if you have a dreamscape or if you are currently dreaming. The target stays asleep for 30 minutes or until awoken.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Sleep Seed remains for (1/2/4/7/30/90/180) day(s) and can be activated after (1 hour/30 minutes/10 minutes/5 minutes/1 minute/30 seconds).

NAME: DREAM DANCE
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a shimmer of hypnomantic energy that swirls around you, closing you into a shallow dream trance. You can cast this spell without rolling to instantly fall into a shallow state of sleep where you have limited, murky awareness of your surroundings and gain no benefits of sleeping, but can instantly start to dream and can wake up at any moment. Originally Havensfeld’s Dream Dance, great interdisciplinary spell designer Havensfeld took her name off the spell when she realized how popular it was with people who just want a quick wet dream and she didn’t want to be associated anymore.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: SOULSIGHT
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell anytime you are inside a dream with somebody else. Roll against a target’s Willpower. On success, you learn one secret they keep. You can only use this spell once in any given sleep. The secrets you learn from them are whichever ones are closest to the front of their mind, so you can reshape the dream to attempt to coax secrets about a certain topic to the front of their mind. Otherwise you might just find a secret about how they actually just pretend to like their mom’s dry and bland Thanksgiving turkey.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree secret(s) about the target.

NAME: VYLA’S WELLSPRING
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell anytime you are inside a dream, creating a spring of pure magic energy that flows from deep within the dreamscape. On success, you can choose one person in your dream with you to take Vyla’s Boon, including yourself. A person can only have a maximum of one Vyla’s Boon, and they can choose which form it takes: • +4 to a spell of their choice • +4 to spell learning rolls or improvement rolls • +4 to artifact backfires or attunement rolls • +6 to rolls to place an enchantment • +2 to Resist any non-Wound condition • +4 to rolls to brew potions • +4 to rolls to craft wands • +4 to rolls to create runes • Vyla’s Boons last for 24 hours, and you cannot cast this spell again until the Boons you have given have worn off.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can grant 1/degree Vyla’s Boon(s).

NAME: GHOST OF HYPNOS
SUBJECT: HYPNOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: A quiet, subtle spell that flares up with a tiny pink glow between your thumb and forefinger, quietly seeping into a person’s consciousness. On success, a target must roll Perception versus your spell check, and if they succeed, then your spell fails, and they know someone tried to cast magic on them. On two degrees of success, they know it was you, and on three or more, they know what you were casting on them. If they fail, you obtain one Ghost Copy of them, and the next time you sleep, you can choose to have their Ghost Copy appear in your dream, a version of them that knows everything they know and behaves like they would but is only a simulation. Each Ghost Copy acts like its own entity with its own memories and feelings, and you can replace them with another one of the Ghost Copies to reset the interaction. Our scientists have been working day and night tirelessly trying to uncover a single ethical use for this spell. We will let you know if they find one.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain 1/degree Ghost Copy(ies).

NAME: RAISE DEAD
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: A deep violet magic flows out from you and into a dead body you can touch. On a success, the body is animated as a puppet under your control for 10 minutes. The animated body has 1 Resolve and rolls 0/5. It might be funny to use this at a funeral, but really, you probably shouldn’t.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can animate 1/degree target(s) for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours). The animated bodies roll 0/(5/6+).

NAME: VOICES FROM BEYOND
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a spectral arched window of violet magic through which you can commune with the departed. On success, you can call forth the spirit of someone departed at the place where their remains are or last were, but only if you know their name, have something that belongs to them, or if you know an identifying feature about them. You can speak to their spirit through the portal for 10 minutes, but they won’t be naturally inclined to help you. They were resting in peace before you rang, you know.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn (0/1+) piece(s) of information about the target right away, and the target is (suspicious/neutral/cooperative/friendly) towards you.

NAME: SOUL BASTION
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Touch a physical container as part of casting this spell. On a success, you implant part of your soul into the container, making it your Bastion. It will stay there for one week, and if you die while your Bastion is active, if your Bastion is opened near your body, it will reanimate you. If someone destroys the physical container, the Bastion is deactivated. You can have as many Bastions at once as you like, but it’s a little creepy to have that many soul jars sitting around.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Bastion remains for (1 week/1 month/3 months/6 months/1 year/unlimited time). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can reanimate yourself from your Bastion instead of needing someone to open the container near your body.

NAME: STEAL SOUL
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can pull a portion of someone’s soul from their body and take it into your own. On a success, a target must roll Endurance or Willpower, being forced to Resist on failure. You can restore one Condition stack for each Condition you inflict this way. If you cast this on your friends, though, it has a side effect of dealing critical damage to your friendships.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: REANIMATE
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can pour your own life force out into a dead body to animate it. You must have at least 4 Resolve to cast this spell. On a success, mark 3 Conditions as your life force pours out into the target body. These Conditions can only be cleared with rest or a Legendary effect. The body is animated as a creature with 3 Resolve, and rolls 2/your Necromancy rank. You have a psychic bond with the creature, and it is loyal to you. You can only have one creature animated this way at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You must mark (3/2/1/0) Condition(s) when you cast this spell.

NAME: AMALGAMATE
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can combine parts from multiple bodies to create a stitched-together abomination. On a success, the amalgamation is animated with 2 Resolve, and rolls 0/4, with a +6 bonus to 1 skill of your choice when you cast this spell. It cannot clear Conditions, and it crumples back into its components when it hits 0 Resolve.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Choose 1/degree skill(s) for the amalgamation to take a +(6/7+) bonus to.

NAME: TWISTED MIRROR OF THE SOUL
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Death, to you, is nothing more than a game you do not wish to lose. On success, create a Homunculus. It looks exactly like you and has all your stats, and will behave the same ways you would behave. When you and your Homunculus are in the same space, you can instantly communicate all memories and experiences you’ve had to one another from since you were last in the same space. If you are ever killed while you have a Homunculus, your consciousness reawakens within an hour in the Homunculus’ body instead. You can have multiple homunculi, but the DC of the spell increases by 10 for each one you currently have.

NAME: VISIONS OF DEATH
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: When you touch a dead person, plant, or animal, you can cast this spell. On success, you can ask the GM one question about how it died. You cannot use this spell multiple times on the same body.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s).

NAME: INTO THE MISTY REALM
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You lurk right on the boundary of life and death. On success, you become a grim icon of morbidity with a deathly pallor, surrounded by an icy mist. While you are in this state, you cannot be Downed. The spell lasts for 10 minutes, and while active, you can grasp someone and drag them beyond the boundaries of the realm. Roll Necromancy versus their Endurance. On a success, you pull their soul from their body and store it in a container, and their body is immediately animated as a puppet under your control. You can place the stolen soul into another body or a construct, at which point their consciousness will take control of the body or construct. Their soul returns to their body after 10 minutes, or if you placed it into another body or construct, it returns once that body is destroyed.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The spell effect lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/2 hours/6 hours/24 hours). Take a +(0/3+) to Necromancy checks during the effect.

NAME: SOUL SWAP
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons dark violet tendrils that snake between two people, switching their souls between their bodies. On success, the two will possess one another’s bodies for 1 hour. An unwilling target can roll Willpower versus your check to resist it. If you cast it as a ritual, both targets must be physically within reach for the entire casting duration.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (1 hour/6 hours/24 hours/1 week/1 month/unlimited time). You can swap (2/3+) people’s souls, switching between them in whatever orientation you like.

NAME: UNBOUND SOUL
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can pull your soul out of your own body and place it into a dead body or construct. On success, you can pour your consciousness into the target container for up to 10 minutes. You take the target’s Body stats, but you retain your other stats. Killing someone to impersonate them with this spell just to go to a party they were invited to is not cool, even if it hurts that you weren’t invited.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can possess the target body for (10 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours/1 week/unlimited time).

NAME: WRAITH
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Transforms your vital energy into a wraithlike entity. On a success, you become incorporeal and capable of levitation for 30 seconds. You cannot pass through magical objects, including any enchanted objects or surfaces with runes, and if you enter antimagic, the effect ends and you must Resist.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (30 second/2 minutes/10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour).

NAME: CALL TASKLINGS
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Plant your wand into the ground and cast this spell to spread deep violet magic like tendrils across the floor, searching for Tasklings. On success, you summon 1 Taskling, a general term for a small undead creature that obeys your commands, whether from animating a piece left from a body or forming a lingering soul into a body. These Tasklings are often small creatures like mice or small birds, which means they have no Resolve and crumple any time they would have to Resist, but they remain indefinitely and follow your orders. Often the only way necromancers have friends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You summon (1/2/5/10+) Tasklings.

NAME: CAPTURE SOUL
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: When you find a person or a creature who has died in the past hour, you can cast this spell without rolling, capturing a piece of its soul into a container. Once you have, you can roll at any point to try pulling information from the captured soul. On success, you can ask one question that the creature or person would have known the answer to, or you can take a +4 bonus to your next spell check. The captured soul passes on peacefully after rolling, success or failure.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s), or take a +(4/5+) bonus to your next spell check.

NAME: WITHER
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Plants cold, dreadful magic into a person that eats away at their soul. Roll against a target’s Willpower or Endurance, and on success, they must Resist. You can take a -4 penalty to the spell to do it subtly, planting the withering magic in a way that they won’t notice it right away, in which case they will need to roll Resist at the end of an hour, unless the magic is dispelled first. Either way, it’s kind of rude, don’t you think?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target takes a -(0/1+) penalty to their Resist roll.

NAME: HERLON’S HAUNTING HAZE
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a swirling cloud of hazy violet magic that channels the ambient dead in the area, gathering a collective consciousness from dead insects, bacteria, cells, and other small lifeforms. On success, you can learn one thing about any life forms or undead that have passed through the area in the past 24 hours. Once you have used this spell in an area, you cannot use it in that area again for another 24 hours. The ambient dead can only give vague ideas of life forms, because, really, how much is a dead dust mite going to know about the difference between your classmate and the Enforcer Captain?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s).

NAME: DEATH MASK
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a cold wave of necromantic energy that pours over a target’s body, enveloping them in a sheen of pale, frigid death. On success, you can make one target, including yourself, appear dead to casual inspection, able to remain completely motionless and undetectable by any technique to find life for up to 4 hours. Someone who wants to check if you really are dead must roll Read Person versus your spell check + 6 to tell that it’s only a magic effect. You cannot see in this state, but you can hear and feel as normal, and you can instantly end the effect on yourself at any point. If someone tries to cast Necromancy spells on you as if you are dead, it causes their spell to backfire and ends the effect on you. This technique is a little extreme to get out of doing the dishes, though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s).

NAME: SKULL GUARDIAN
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a dead body or spend 500 materials to construct an undead amalgamation. On success, you animate a Skull Guardian, an undead sentinel that has the stats the creature had in life, or if you used materials, 3 Resolve and rolls 3/8. Your Skull Guardian does not have any intelligence or follow directions other than commanding it to be on alert or to stand down. It will stay indefinitely in the spot where it was summoned, and if anybody other than you attempts to enter the Skull Guardian’s space, it will attack them. You can specify any number of people for the Skull Guardian to not attack, or alternately, command it to only attack people you do specify. If you use materials and fail the spell roll, your materials are refunded. Your Skull Guardian lasts indefinitely, but it cannot restore Conditions, and once it hits 0, it crumbles. Skull Guardians have no thoughts or feelings and do not react to anything except people to attack, but necromancers universally agree that they really like house music.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The Skull Guardian has (3/4/5/6/7) Resolve and rolls 3/(8/9+). If you spend materials to create it, the cost is (500/400/300/200/100/50/0) materials.

NAME: WITHERBARK
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Pours a flow of violet magic swirling slowly from the tip of your wand into a dead plant, animating it under your directions. Roll normally, or against the Intensity Rank for a magic plant. On success, you can reanimate the plant, with one property of your choice: • The plant can walk slowly • The plant will remember everything it sees and store it in a way you can extract from it later without a check • The plant can attack and will attempt so on a target or type of target you specify • The plant can speak • The plant will attempt to take something if it sees it and keep it there • A reanimated plant is treated as a creature with 1 Resolve that rolls 0/6, and it will stay animated for 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose 1/degree property(ies), whether on one plant or spread between multiple.

NAME: ENDRYA’S HYPNOTIC LIGHT
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell the first time you see a given undead creature, creating a wreath of shimmering violet lights that swirl slowly around your head, mesmerizing undead creatures. Roll against the creature’s Strong roll. On success, it is either mesmerized and holds still watching the light for 30 seconds, or it becomes friendly towards you, at the GM’s discretion. Admittedly, the lights can look pretty cool, so living people might be a bit mesmerized too. Or maybe that’s just me. Am I undead?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target is mesmerized for (30 seconds/1 minute/10 minutes/as long as you like). Take a +(0/1+) bonus on any checks against a mesmerized creature.

NAME: GRAVE LANTERN
SUBJECT: NECROMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a pale flickering bone-white flame in the palm of your hand that casts light further than it should be able to for its size. Name a dead person, and roll against a DC based on how long they’ve been dead: • Less than 10 years: DC10 • Less than 50 years: DC18 • Less than 200 years: DC24 • Less than 500 years: DC31 • 500 years or more: DC36 • On success, you call out to the spirit of the departed, and if they wish to be contacted, they will appear as a specter before you, and you can communicate with them. They remain there as long as they choose to, and they have all the memories they would have had in life, but usually they don’t remember how they died.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn (0/1+) piece(s) of information about the target if they choose to appear.

NAME: HERLON’S SWARM
SUBJECT: SUMMONING
DESCRIPTION: Summons a swarm of small creatures. Choose a Condition and a skill when you cast this. On success, you summon a swarm of tiny creatures that embody both your choices. The swarm functions as a creature with 1 Resolve, and it rolls with a +5 to your chosen skill and a +0 to everything else. The swarm obeys your commands, and if they swarm a creature, the target must roll Endurance or Willpower versus your spell check or Resist the Condition you chose when you cast this spell. The great wizard Herlon really liked bee swarms, but mostly just to pollinate his flowers.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can choose 1/degree skill(s) that the swarm rolls with a +(5/8+) bonus.

NAME: CONJURE OBJECT
SUBJECT: SUMMONING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a ripple of vermillion magic you can plunge your hand through to draw an object from another plane. On success, you can instantly obtain an object up to 5 kilograms in the general shape that you specify, made of strange, extraplanar material. Choose one of the following options: • The object constantly shifts its shape • The object is painful to the touch • The object is repulsive • The object is fascinating • The object fuses with other objects or surfaces • The object resists changes to velocity, temperature, or other physical properties • The object lasts for 5 minutes before it disintegrates back into a ripple like it came from.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can summon an object up to 5/degree kilograms for (5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: SUMMON ELEMENTAL
SUBJECT: SUMMONING
DESCRIPTION: Creates a glowing vermillion circle on the ground inlaid with countless complex symbols and glyphs. On success, an elemental creature of your choice is summoned into the plane.
