DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of lapis lazuli, granting an ethereal aura of higher communion. You take a +1 bonus to Summoning and can vaguely sense the presence of creatures beyond this plane, and once per hour, or you can ask a small question of one type of extraplanar creature of your choice from anywhere in the planes. You can only have one Alignment at a time. The extraplanar creatures typically want to be helpful, but they have a strange view of what helpful looks like.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You take a +1/degree bonus to Summoning and can ask a question of extraplanar creatures once per (1 hour/30 minutes/20 minutes/10 minutes/5 minutes). Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: JADE HARMONY
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of jade, granting an aura of balance. The harmonious balancing effect prevents you from rolling more than 1 degree of failure on spells, but also prevents you from rolling more than 2 degrees of success on spells. Any effects outside the spell itself that trigger on certain numbers of degrees of failure or success are triggered based on the original results. You can only have one Alignment at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You cannot roll more than (2/2/3/3/4) degrees of success on spells. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: MOONLIT MEMORIES
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of moonstone, granting a guiding aura. The magic guides your intuition, and every hour, you can ask the GM for one insight on the current situation. You can only have one Alignment at a time. People get really attached to this alignment and start using it to seek answers like “what should I have for breakfast,” which the moonstone doesn’t really know what to do with.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask the GM for one insight on the current situation once per (1 hour/30 minutes/20 minutes/10 minutes/5 minutes). Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: LIGHT OF PASSION
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of garnet, granting a passionate aura. The magic intensifies feelings around you, and any success on a Charm check takes a +2 bonus, but any failure takes a -2 penalty. You can only have one Alignment at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Any successful Charm checks take a +2/degree bonus. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: NATURAL GIFT
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of citrine, granting an aura of abundance. The alignment sets you up to receive abundance, and any time you receive materials from a Downtime activity or class-learning benefit, you receive an extra 100. You can only have one Alignment at a time. It’s not going to help you with your spending habits, though.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Every time you gain materials from a Downtime activity or class-learning benefit, you gain 100/degree more materials. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: JET-BLACK PURITY
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of obsidian, granting a healing aura. Take a +2 bonus to checks to clear other people’s Conditions, and any time you would restore a non-Wound Condition stack, you restore a second stack of the same Condition. You can only have one Alignment at a time. Finally, magic to help you get over your ex. It’s popular with lesbians. Just kidding, all the crystals are popular with lesbians.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +2/degree bonus to checks to clear other people’s Conditions. Whenever you clear a non-Wound Condition stack, you can clear (another/another/another/another/all) stack(s) of that Condition. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: TOUCH OF GENTLENESS
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of chrysocolla, granting a soothing aura. People are less likely to be angry around you and strong emotions of all sorts will be dampened around you, and you can take a +1 to Tact checks and to any Charm checks to soothe somebody. You can only have one Alignment at a time. What’s even more effective than this spell, though, is just not being a jerk who gets people angry. But what do I know?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +1/degree bonus to Tact checks and to any Charm checks to soothe somebody. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: RITUAL OF BLOOD
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of bloodstone, granting a restoring aura of blood magic. The alignment channels magic power inside your blood to stabilize you, and anytime you take Wound, you can clear one stack of any non-Wound condition. Take a +2 bonus to Endurance. You can only have one Alignment at a time. People under the effect of this alignment are probably the only people who can actually get rid of depression by running a lot.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +2/degree bonus to Endurance. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: PRISM OF THE MIND
SUBJECT: CRYSTALLOMANCY
DESCRIPTION: Creates an Alignment of sodalite, granting an aura of cool reason. The magic helps sort through logic and reasoning, giving a +1 bonus to Logic checks. You can only have one Alignment at a time.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +1/degree bonus to Logic checks. Take a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: DARK COMMUNION
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Connects you with a demonic being that does your bidding. On success, you can do one of the following: • Gain insight into what happened here • Ask where someone who was here went • Force someone nearby to Resist Fear • Ask a question about a magic object or phenomenon • Gain one-use access to a Standard or Basic spell you don’t know
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take 1/degree option(s), and a +1/degree bonus to your backfire roll.

NAME: DEMONIC POSSESSION
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Offer up your body for a demon to temporarily join with your soul. On success, a demon latches onto your soul, riding along in your body for 10 minutes. Take a +3 bonus to 2 Abilities of your choice, except for Willpower. At the GM’s discretion at points during the effect, you may need to roll Willpower, DC15, to resist the demon’s attempts to take control, doing the demon’s bidding on failure. You cannot cast this spell again until the effect ends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +(3/4+) bonus to (2/3+) Ability(ies) of your choice. Take a +1/degree bonus to your checks to resist the demon’s will.

NAME: SUMMON LESSER DEMON
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Draw a twisted magic circle to summon a minor demonic creature. On success, a demonic creature that knows 3 spells of the GM’s choice in a field of magic you request appears. The creature is neutral to you and stays for 10 minutes or until you dismiss it, unless it doesn’t want to be dismissed. You’d be surprised how cooperative they aren’t.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The demon knows (3/3/4/4/5/5/6) spells across (1/1/1/2) field(s) of your choice. It is (neutral/cooperative/friendly) to you and lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: FORGE BLOOD PACT
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: When you draw up a contract, each party involved can offer their blood to sign the contract. On success, the contract becomes a Blood Pact, and everyone who has signed the contract must make a Willpower check versus your spell check to ever violate it, being unable to on failure and being forced to Resist on one degree of success. A Blood Pact will only disappear if there are conditions for its completion specified in the contract.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: DEMONIC BOND
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Form a connection with a demon who will whisper in your ear. On a success, you form a connection with a demon. It can perceive everything you perceive and you can hear its voice in your head. The demon may be able to give you insight, information, or even cast spells through you at your request, but it will ask you something in return. If the demon performs a check or casts a spell for you, it rolls 3/9.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The demon rolls (3/4+)/(9/11+). It will tend to give you more favorable terms on its deals with more degrees of success.

NAME: DEMONIC TRANSFORMATION
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: The pitch black magic of demons flows like ink through your veins, transforming you. On success, you transform into a demonic version of yourself for 10 minutes, with a +6 to all Resist checks except Doubt and the ability to reroll spell checks once each (except on backfires). Each time you Resist a Condition, the transformation extends by 5 minutes. If the transformation lasts for 30 minutes or you reach 3 stacks of Doubt, you lose control of your body to a demon for 10 minutes or until you fall unconscious.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +(0/1+) to spell checks during the effect, and a +(6/7+) bonus to Resist checks other than Doubt. The transformation can last for up to (30/40/50/60) minutes before you lose control.

NAME: KEEPER OF DARK PROMISES
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: The authority of the twisted Lady of Darkness flows from your fingertips. On a success, you take on a slight demonic appearance for the next week, and you can hear a council of powerful demons whispering in your ears. The council gives you 1 piece of information about everyone you meet for the first time since casting this spell, a secret piece of information if they have it, and you can tell if somebody has any contacts with demons by looking at them. You can form contracts as if casting Forge Blood Pact without rolling, using your check for this spell as the spell check. You may also break a Blood Pact, although it will render you and everyone else involved in the contract unconscious for 24 hours and desperately weak to the point of -6 to all checks for the next week. The council, unfortunately, also tends to weigh in on your decisions, your study practices, your love life…
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain 1/degree piece(s) of information about each person you meet since you cast this spell, and with more degrees of success, the council is more likely to know deeper secrets. The penalty after breaking a Blood Pact is (-6/-4/-2/-0).

NAME: DEMONIC HAUNTING
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: You can unleash twisting tendrils of inky black magic that thrash wildly across the environment. On success, one uncontrollable demon manifests as a spectral entity, wreaking havoc on the surroundings for up to 1 minute. Anyone caught in the haunting area must roll Willpower versus your spell check or be forced to Resist your choice of Fear or Despair. Any magic caught in the haunting becomes corrupted until the effect ends.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for up to (1 minute/5 minutes/15 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: JET-BLACK CORRUPTION
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Releases a swarm of creeping black tendrils that worm into a magic object or phenomenon. Roll normally or versus the spell check that created the magic, at the GM’s discretion. On success, you corrupt the magic to a demonic version, changing one aspect of it to your liking. The corruption stays until the magic is destroyed or dispelled, and will act however it can within the confines of what you cast it on to cause harm and fear.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can change 1/degree aspect(s) of the magic. On 3 or more degrees of success, you can make the magic appear to not be corrupted until it acts.

NAME: DEMON’S INSIGHT
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Choose a demon when you take this spell, including its twisted motive. At any time, you can cast this spell to seek the demon’s insight on a specific topic or object. On success, the demon will give you one piece of insight, and it will not lie, but it will be willing to twist the truth in any way that furthers its goal. Once you use this spell, the demon will not respond for another hour, after which you can use it again.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The demon will give you 1/degree piece(s) of insight.

NAME: DREADFUL WHISPERS
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a creeping black swarm that invades a person’s body via their mouth or nose. On success, the target must roll Willpower or become Haunted. A person Haunted in this way is connected directly to a demon you can choose when you cast this spell, and the demon can speak in their mind at all times and can force the target to make a Willpower check versus your spell check or do one thing the demon commands. This effect lasts for 24 hours, but if you recast it, the effect is renewed. If the effect lasts for 72 hours on one person, it becomes permanent. The demon you implant in their mind will be grateful to you, particularly if you make the effect permanent.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (24/36/48/60/72) hours.

NAME: CHARM OF THE DARK LADY
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Taps into the subtle mind-altering magics of the Lady of Darkness. On success, your eyes flash a brief dark, imperceptible except to anyone watching for it, and you can choose one person to make a Willpower check versus your spell check. If they fail, they believe what you are saying, or you can cast this spell immediately after a Charm check fails and use this effect to instead make the check a success. They will feel something off about it but won’t be able to place it unless they suspect you might be using magic and roll Read Person versus your spell check + 5. Otherwise, they are likely to believe what you say but not like it, or just brush off the feeling.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s). The target is more likely to accept the feeling as normal on more degrees of success.

NAME: BLACK-BLOOD LURE
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: When you are attempting to convince somebody to do something that a demon also wants them to do (whether they know about the demon or not), you can cast this spell with a +4 bonus in the place of any other Charm checks you might make, at the same DC. The bonus becomes +8 if you or they have a contract with that demon.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: EYES OF THE BARRISTER
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a person. On success, you can learn about one Blood Pact they have, if any. If you use this spell on a person again and they haven’t signed any new Blood Pacts since then, you must Resist.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn about 1/degree Blood Pact(s). If you have more degrees of success than they have Blood Pacts, then you will learn that, but otherwise you will not know how many more the target may have.

NAME: HEART-EATING SIGIL
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Heart-shaped symbols appear in your pupils when you cast this spell, although the person you are using this effect on cannot see it. Roll against a target’s Willpower. On a success, they instantly like you as if you rolled Win Over with 2 degrees of success. This effect lasts for 10 minutes, after which it ends suddenly, the jolt of which might lead them to suspect you did something to them. On 2 or more degrees of failure, they will realize you are casting magic on them, and on 3 or more, they know what you’re casting. If the target is a PC, they can choose to Resist instead on failure.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target will like you as if you’ve rolled Win Over with 2/degree degrees of success for (10 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours). On 3 or more degrees of success, the feelings wear off slowly and subtly, making the target less suspicious.

NAME: QUIET PROMISES
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell while talking to somebody to summon a glow of inky black magic that creeps slowly around your ring finger. Roll against a target’s Concentration or Perception. If they fail, you can roll any Charm check against them without them realizing you are attempting it, and without any consequences on failure. The target won’t realize you attempted to cast this spell unless you have 4 or more degrees of failure.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +(0/2+) bonus to the Charm check.

NAME: INFERNAL BARGAIN
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a psychic link with a demon whose interests are aligned with yours in the moment. On success, you form a psychic connection with a demon who makes an ask of you. If you complete the demon’s request, you can receive a bonus of +1 to any Ability of your choice that lasts for one hour. If you reject the demon’s offer, you must Resist. If you have a connection with the demon, like a contract with one or through a spell like Demonic Bond or Demon’s Insight, the DC on the spell becomes 5. Remember: deals with demons are good ideas and always lead to good things!
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Take a +1 to 1/degree Ability(ies) of your choice if you complete the demon’s ask, which can be the same Ability multiple times.

NAME: INKY WHISPER
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a small halo of black around the edges of your irises, glowing softly. On success, A target you can see must roll Willpower versus your spell check or perform one action small enough to not require a check for each degree of failure on their check. They will regard it as an accident if it could feasibly be an accident or their own idea if not, although they might be confused about why they decided to do that. If they succeed on their Willpower check with 2 degrees of success, they know someone was trying to manipulate them, and on 3 or more, they know it was you. You cannot use this to compel somebody to perform an action they know will get them hurt, unless they fail with 4 or more degrees of failure.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect 1/degree target(s). On 3 or more degrees of success, you can compel people into actions large enough to require 1 check.

NAME: BAYWATCH’S BASTION
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Casts a shining enchantment that twinkles onyx around you before fading into a faint gleam. On success, you turn the space you are in into your Bastion. You take a +4 to Charm checks inside your Bastion, and people are less likely to be upset with you on failure, as demonological influence weaves into their minds. Take one extra bonus: • Take a +2 to all Demonology spells cast in your Bastion • +4 on any checks to interact with demons in your Bastion • You can ignore any demonic links or contracts you have while inside your Bastion • Anyone who spends 8 hours inside your Bastion likes you better, as if you rolled Win Over with 1 degree of success against them • Restore a stack of Doubt every time you sleep in your Bastion • Bastions last until dismissed. You can have as many Bastions as you like, but the DC to create them increases by 5 for each Bastion you have.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take 1/degree extra option(s). Take a +(4/5+) bonus to Charm checks inside your Bastion.

NAME: BALLAD OF THE ABYSSAL CAGE
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Sears the ground black around you in a runic pattern as you attempt to forge a connection with a higher demon. On success, you contact a True Demon to request assistance. You can take a +8 bonus to one Ability of your choice, other than Willpower, for one hour, during which time you cannot cast this spell again. Any time you use that ability within that hour, you must roll Willpower, DC20. If you fail the Willpower roll, then the True Demon possesses you for the rest of the spell duration. True Demons are rarely wantonly violent like other demons, though, and it is unlikely they will possess you to get you hurt or have you hurt somebody else. Usually it will just be something that’s somehow worse, like that you go to an abandoned shed in the woods and open one window for five minutes and close it again, and you’ll spend the next three weeks worrying about what exactly that did for the demon until, tragically, you find out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can pick 1/degree Ability(ies) to take a +(8/10+) bonus. You cannot pick the same ability multiple times.

NAME: PRETTY PORCELAIN DOLL
SUBJECT: DEMONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell by taking both of someone’s hands and looking them in the eye, speaking a command phrase given to you by a True Demon communed with in the process of learning this spell. On success, the target must roll Willpower versus your spell check or become your Doll, psychically controlled as an extension of your body for 15 minutes. If you cast this effect on a target at least once a day every day for 5 days in a row, the effect becomes permanent. The target has no memories of their time as your Doll. It’s probably a useful spell, but it might be a little creepy, I don’t know.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: A target who fails this spell check becomes your Doll for (15 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours).

NAME: DRAGON SKIN
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a protective coating from draconic shielding. On a success, you wrap yourself in a coat of shimmering magic scales for 10 minutes. While this effect is active, you can take a +1 bonus to Resist checks, not counting a Resist check from this spell backfiring. Plus, it looks pretty badass. That’s why you’re studying draconology, right?
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +1/degree bonus to Resist checks for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours).

NAME: WYVERN’S TALON
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Surrounds one hand with a swirl of draconic energy that coalesces into a wicked talon. On success, you transform one hand into a talon that you can use to cut anything that a typical knife will cut, and lets you make an Athletics check with a +1 bonus against a target’s Agility or Endurance to force them to Resist Wound. The effect lasts until you dispel it, but you have no dexterity with the talon and take a -4 penalty to checks requiring both hands.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +1/degree bonus to Athletics checks forcing targets to Resist Wound.

NAME: DRAGON TRAIL
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: A spectral dragon’s wing appears in the air, reacting to the surroundings. On success, it will show you one thing about any draconic creatures that have been in the area over the last 24 hours. You can only use this spell on a given area once per day.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree piece(s) of information about dragons that have been in the area over the last 24 hours.

NAME: RAGE OF THE ANCIENTS
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Channels into the elemental wrath of ancient dragons. On success, you obtain 3 spheres of concentrated fire, frost, or lightning energy that circle chaotically around you. You can throw any number of them, where they travel in a straight line until they hit a surface and explode. Anybody caught in the path must roll Agility versus your check or be forced to Resist against your spell check + 4, and anybody caught in the blast radius must roll Endurance or be forced to Resist against your spell check - 4. You can hold onto the spheres for up to 5 minutes after casting, after which they flicker out.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You obtain 3/degree spheres.

NAME: PRIMAL INSTINCTS
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: A swirl of deep jade light surrounds you and takes the shape of dragon’s wings, giving you an intuitive connection to draconic creatures. On success, you can ask one question of the GM about a specific draconic creature you’re interacting with. This spell is the fastest way to learn that dragons can actually be pretty boring people, too.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can ask 1/degree question(s).

NAME: DRAGONBREATH
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: A crest of jade-colored magic settles like a dragon’s crest on your head. On success, you can unleash a peal of spectral fire from your mouth or hands, superheating anything in the effect range, enough to melt up to 5 kilograms of most metals. Anyone caught in the effect must roll Agility against your spell check or Resist. The dragons’ primal wrath is hard to shake off after using this ability—using the ability leaves you inclined to aggression for a short period afterwards.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You have enough fire to melt up to 5/degree kilograms of most metals and anything with a lower melting point. Your fire is hotter on more degrees of success. You can choose (0/1+) target(s) to be unaffected by the fire.

NAME: CALL OF THE ELDER BLOOD
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Lets out a ripple of primal draconic magic into the surroundings, a subtle flash of jade-colored magic from your chest in the language of the dragons. On success, you attract draconic creatures from your surroundings. You can specify one type of draconic creature that is especially drawn by the call or one type that isn’t called, but beyond that, any type of dragon will feel the call. This doesn’t guarantee that dragons will respond to the call, or that if they do, they’ll be friendly. That’s important.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can draw the attention of dragons from a wider area, and they’re more likely to come and more likely to be friendly, on higher degrees of success. You can specify 1/degree type(s) of draconic creatures to be more drawn or less drawn by the call.

NAME: WINGS OF THE ANCIENTS
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Coalesces jade magic into a massive pair of spectral dragon’s wings that float behind you. On success, the wings persist for 5 minutes, and they allow you to fly at your walking speed. While active, you can roll Athletics with a +1 bonus to perform maneuvers like high-speed flight or difficult movements. You can carry one person with you without penalties. Lesser draconic creatures are more likely to respect you while this effect is active, while stronger dragons are more likely to be friendly to you. Some take it as an affront, though. Watch out for those guys.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The effect lasts for (5 minutes/15 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours), during which time you take a +1/degree bonus to Athletics checks to perform flight maneuvers.

NAME: SANCTUARY
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: In the tradition of the ancient dragons, you can guard a place as your magic sanctuary. Choose an enclosed or remote location when you cast this spell. On success, spectral magic filters through the area, marking it as your Sanctuary. Pick one Stat or two Abilities for anyone inside your Sanctuary to take a +1 bonus to, and you take a +4 to Resist checks inside the Sanctuary. You are psychically alerted to any creatures entering your Sanctuary, and creatures know to stay away. Casting a new Sanctuary replaces the old one. If you set up a Sanctuary on a dragon’s turf, it will hunt you down. Rule of thumb? You don’t want that. But I won’t tell you what to do.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Your chosen Stat or two Abilities take a +1/degree bonus inside your Sanctuary.

NAME: DRAGON TAMER
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a flash of insight in a magic link between you and a dragon. Roll against a draconic creature’s Strong roll. On success, you learn one thing important to that creature, and it is more inclined to like you. That said, you run the risk of finding out a dragon only eats gemstones and marshmallows, and then you don’t really want to try befriending it.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You learn 1/degree thing(s) important to the creature, and the creature is more likely to like you more with more degrees of success.

NAME: ASCENSION OF THE MORTAL GODS
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Dragon’s blood courses through your veins, transforming your very shape. On success, you take on the form of a full-sized adult dragon for 10 minutes. While in this state, you are immune to Evocation magic, and when you cast a Standard or Basic Draconology spell, you can choose to replace the result with your check on this spell, although any backfires or improvement rolls are triggered with the original rolls. If you would take a Condition while in this state, you can choose to ignore it. If you use this ability three times, it shatters your draconic form, ending the spell early. When you use this spell, draconic creatures within your region will develop strong feelings about it, positive or negative. Anyone you step on while you’re figuring out your new shape will probably also have strong feelings.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: Your transformation lasts for (10 minutes/30 minutes/1 hour/4 hours/8 hours/24 hours). You can block (3/4/5/6/7) Conditions before your form shatters.

NAME: DRACONIC BOND
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: A thin trail of jade magic links you to a draconic creature. Roll against a DC equal to 15 + 3 times the creature’s Resolve. On success, you create a telepathic link between yourself and the creature, allowing the two of you to communicate even if you don’t share a language. Just because you have this link does not mean the creature will like you, but you can take a +4 bonus on checks to charm it. You can only have a link like this with one draconic creature at a time, but you can end the effect at any point.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can take a +(4/6+) bonus to checks to charm the creature. Take a +(0/1+) bonus to a Skill the draconic creature rolls Strong with while you have the bond.

NAME: STEADFAST
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: A flare of draconic magic that courses through you, giving you a dragon’s stalwart resolve. Any time you would have to roll Endurance or Willpower to resist an effect, you can instead roll this spell against the same DC.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: N/A

NAME: NOBLE WORD OF POWER
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Speaks a single word in a forceful draconic tongue with a flare of magic behind it to exert authority over lesser draconic creatures. On success, any draconic creatures with 1 maximum Resolve who can hear you are instantly responsive to you for 5 minutes and must roll Willpower against your check to disobey your will, although they follow you out of fear and awe and not out of friendship, which means they will likely take the first opportunity they can to get away once they’ve done as you’ve asked. Scaleworms, the lowest pest of the draconic creatures, are immune, much to everyone’s dismay. They don’t care about authority.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect any draconic creatures with a maximum Resolve up to 1/degree. The effect lasts for (5 minutes/10 minutes/20 minutes/40 minutes/1 hour/2 hours/4 hours/8 hours).

NAME: BALEFUL MARK
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell if you are familiar with a specific draconic creature, to cast a bolt of jade light at a target that explodes into a glowing jade mark on their body. On success, 1 target must roll Agility or Draconology versus your check or take a Baleful Mark on their body for 24 hours. While afflicted with a Baleful Mark, the draconic creature you are familiar with will regard them as a threat, treating them with scorn and contempt or, if the creature is of lesser intelligence, simply attack on sight. If the draconic creature is friendly with the target, it will instead be confused and prefer to just avoid the target until the Baleful Mark is gone. You can cast this on any creature, including a draconic creature, but if you try to use it to make a draconic creature hostile towards itself, it will just give you a look.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can affect up to 1/degree target(s).

NAME: DRAGON’S DEN
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Summons a shower of jade light that rains down in glimmering streaks around you. On success, you make the space around you your Dragon’s Den, which causes draconic creatures to naturally gravitate to it and be friendly to you inside it. Draconic creatures that rest in this space clear 2 Conditions instead of 1, and draconic creatures will have a tendency to hoard treasure here. Every 24 hours, you can collect 100 materials, taking what the draconic creatures share with you. You can only have one Dragon’s Den at a time. You can dispel your Dragon’s Den at any time, but the dragons in it will probably be upset.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can collect 100/degree materials from your Dragon’s Den every 24 hours.

NAME: DRAGON-EGG GLOW
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: Creates a soft glow of pale jade light that can nurture draconic creatures. On success, you can give a nurturing, soothing energy to any one draconic creature that is not fully grown. The creature will like you more for doing so, and you can either teach it a technique that it can perform a check for, such as teaching it to Search an area or teaching it to Sleight of Hand to steal something from someone, or you can increase one of its Ability scores by 1. The GM may decide a given draconic creature has grown all it can for its life phase and not allow further stat increases, or rule that it can only know so many techniques and ask you to pick a technique to forget when you teach it a new one. You can also use this spell on a draconic creature’s egg. If you do, it will hatch after using this spell 5 times on it, and the creature will immediately be friendly to you. You can only cast this spell once every 24 hours.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: You can teach a technique or increase the target dragon’s Ability score (1/1/2/2/3) time(s).

NAME: EMBER’S JADE SADDLE
SUBJECT: DRACONOLOGY
DESCRIPTION: You can cast this spell on a draconic creature that is friendly to you and allows you to. On a success, the spell flashes with a brilliant light that settles over the draconic creature’s haunches with a glowing jade-green symbol and a matching symbol on the back of your hand, giving that creature a Jade Saddle. Anytime a draconic creature has a Jade Saddle you’ve created, you can call the creature to your side at any time, from anywhere on the same plane, and you can cast this spell again anytime the draconic creature is in sight to manifest a spectral jade-green link between you and the creature and pull you towards one another. If the creature is large enough for it, you can ride it without any checks, but if you put a Jade Saddle on a draconewt, well… you can put a little minifigure on its back or something. That’d be cute.
HIGHER-LEVEL BEHAVIOR: The target creature takes a +(0/1+) bonus to its Strong roll around you, and you can take a +(0/1+) bonus to Body checks while riding the target creature, if possible.
